Street walkers , not for laziness , but yes for dead-ends . And last time I checked , Portugal was in the West .

source: This provision applies to debt forgiven in calendar years 2007 through 2012 . Up to $2 million of forgiven debt is eligible for this exclusion ( $1 million if married filing separately ) . The exclusion does not apply if the discharge is due to services performed for the lender or any other reason not directly related to a decline in the home 's value or the taxpayer 's financial condition .

source: You can find House Sparrows most places where there are houses ( or other buildings ) , and few places where there are n't . Along with two other introduced species , the European Starling and the Rock Pigeon , these are some of our most common birds . Their constant presence outside our doors makes them easy to overlook , and their tendency to displace native birds from nest boxes causes some people to resent them . But House Sparrows , with their capacity to live so intimately with us , are just beneficiaries of our own success .  Typical Voice  Size &; Shape

source: The method of detection of the variation decrease point F will be briefly described in the following . The intensity of the superposed light is measured every small unit of time . The difference between the presently measured and the previous values is obtained . Absolute values of the differences for 50 measurements for example are accumulated . The accumulated value is considered to represent the variation range of the intensity of the superposed light during the 50 measurements . The point where the result of the accumulation is smaller than a prescribed value is determined to be the variation decrease point F. Since this method is the same as a method of detection of a variation decrease point F used in an embodiment of the present invention , a detailed description thereof is set forth below .
domestication: 检测变异减少点F的方法简要如下：每隔很短的时间，就测量一下叠加光的强度。然后计算出当前测量值与之前测量值之间的差值。例如，累积50次测量的差值的绝对值，这个累积值就代表了这50次测量中叠加光强度的变异范围。最后，找出累积结果小于某个设定值的点，就是变异减少点F。由于这种方法和本发明的一个具体实施例中的变异减少点F的检测方法是一样的，所以详细描述放在后面了。
foreignization: F 的变化减少点的检测方法将在下面简要描述。每个小的时间单位内都要测量叠加光的强度。获得当前测量值与前一个值之间的差值。例如，对50次测量中差值的绝对值进行累积。累积值被认为代表了在50次测量期间叠加光强度的变化范围。在累积结果小于规定值的位置被确定为变化减少点F。由于此方法与本发明的实例中使用的F变化减少点检测方法相同，因此详细描述如下。

source: that is absolutely why its been an issue at all recently . Regular people have been fed up with this shit for decades but it was n't a major component of political campaigning until the last couple of years . It became a political platform issue once some industries started getting angry about how much money was being wasted . We are seeing a big fight between industries trying to take from each other , and the insurance industry has the most to lose in this fight so they are going at it much harder than the rest .
domestication: 这就是为什么这件事最近成为了一个问题。普通人早就受够了这种胡闹，但直到最近几年，这才成为政治运动中的重要议题。一旦某些行业开始抱怨浪费的钱太多，这就成为了政客们炒作的题目。现在，我们看到各个行业之间在争夺利益，你抢我，我抢你。保险业是最有可能损失的行业，所以他们比其他人更加拼命地战斗。
foreignization: 这就是为什么近期会成为一个问题。普通人已经厌倦了这种情况几十年了，但直到最近几年，这才成为政治竞选中的一个重要组成部分。一旦一些行业开始愤怒于浪费的钱太多，这就成了一个政治平台的问题。我们看到各个行业之间正在进行一场大规模的斗争，试图从对方那里获取利益，而保险业在这场斗争中最有可能损失，因此他们比其他行业更加努力地进行着这场斗争。

that is absolutely why its been an issue at all recently . Regular people have been fed up with this shit for decades but it was n't a major component of political campaigning until the last couple of years . It became a political platform issue once some industries started getting angry about how much money was being wasted . We are seeing a big fight between industries trying to take from each other , and the insurance industry has the most to lose in this fight so they are going at it much harder than the rest .
这就是为什么这件事最近成为了一个问题。普通人早就受够了这种胡闹，但直到最近几年，这才成为政治运动中的重要议题。一旦某些行业开始抱怨浪费的钱太多，这就成为了政客们炒作的题目。现在，我们看到各个行业之间在争夺利益，你抢我，我抢你。保险业是最有可能损失的行业，所以他们比其他人更加拼命地战斗。

that is absolutely why its been an issue at all recently . We are seeing a big fight between industries trying to take from each other , and the insurance industry has the most to lose in this fight so they are going at it much harder than the rest .
这就是为什么近期会成为一个问题。普通人已经厌倦了这种情况几十年了，但直到最近几年，这才成为政治竞选中的一个重要组成部分。一旦一些行业开始愤怒于浪费的钱太多，这就成了一个政治平台的问题。我们看到各个行业之间正在进行一场大规模的斗争，试图从对方那里获取利益，而保险业在这场斗争中最有可能损失，因此他们比其他行业更加努力地进行着这场斗争。

source: Republicans , controlling many state governments , will continue their carefully planned effort to restrict voting among the folks most likely to vote Democratic . Fewer early-voting opportunities , more photo-I.D. requirements , and other " minor reforms " will subtract from the Democratic vote totals in 2016 .
domestication: 共和党控制了许多州政府，他们会继续推行他们精心策划的限制选民投票的计划。这些计划主要针对那些最有可能支持民主党的选民。通过减少提前投票的机会，增加照片识别要求，以及其他一些所谓的“小改革”，这些政策将会在2016年的大选中降低民主党的票数。他们的做法是逐步蚕食，步步紧逼，让民主党的支持者们感到举步维艰，最后不得不放弃投票的权利。这是美国政治中常见的一种现象，即通过各种手段来限制某些群体的投票权，进而影响选举结果。这种做法让人感觉很是不公平和不民主，因为它剥夺了公民的基本权利。
foreignization: 共和党人控制着许多州政府，将继续他们精心策划的限制投票工作，主要针对那些最有可能投票给民主党的民众。较少的提前投票机会、更多的照片识别要求以及其他“小改革”将会减少2016年民主党的选票总数。

source: There is no question this case was closely studied by Chief Justice John Roberts . He knew this decision would not only make or break his legacy , but also determine the fate of MILLIONS of Americans . At the end of the day he voted with his heart and his brain . He also arguably voted with his conscience .

source: Kansas State put together a 23-10 win over TCU , which doesn ' t exactly jump off the page . While he did register two rushing touchdowns , Heisman front-runner Collin Klein threw an interception and passed for only 145 yards against a defense that has given up passing yards in bunches the past few weeks .
domestication: 堪萨斯州立大学以23-10击败TCU，这个成绩乍一看似乎并不惊人。虽然Collin Klein确实跑进了两个达阵，但他在传球方面表现平平，仅仅传出了145码，而且还被拦截了一次。尤其是面对一个最近几周都被传球狂轰烂炸的防守，Klein的表现更是让人觉得有些失望。原本被看好的海斯曼奖候选人Klein，这场比赛的表现也就一般般，没有特别出色的地方。

source: It was reported that a huge blaze wrecked the Hogwarts set after a battle scene went spectacularly wrong . According to the report , explosives used in action sequences set light to scenery for the wizardry school , and that firefighters battled for 40 minutes to bring the flames under control but the set - centerpiece for the film 's Battle of Hogwarts climax - was left badly damaged . It was later confirmed that the fire was greatly exaggerated , and that the set that had been damaged was going to need be rebuilt anyway for use in another scene . Some actors were still filming at the studio but none of the movie 's biggest stars - Daniel Radcliffe ( Harry ) , Emma Watson ( Hermione ) or Rupert Grint ( Ron Weasley ) - were involved . No one was injured .
domestication: 据报道，在拍摄一场战斗场景时出了差错，一场巨大的火灾席卷了霍格沃茨的拍摄现场。根据报道，动作场景中使用的爆炸物点燃了魔法学校的布景，消防队员奋战40分钟才控制住了火势，但影片《霍格沃茨之战》高潮戏的核心场景遭到了严重破坏。后来证实，这场火灾被大大夸张了，而且受损的布景原本也需要为了另一场景而重新搭建。有些演员仍在工作室拍摄，但是电影中最大的明星，如丹尼尔·雷德克里夫（哈利）、艾玛·沃森（赫敏）和鲁伯特·格林特（罗恩·韦斯利）都没有参与。幸好，没有人受伤。
foreignization: 据报道，一场巨大的火灾在拍摄一场战斗场景时发生了严重错误，导致魔法学校的布景被毁坏。根据报告，用于拍摄动作场面的爆炸物点燃了布景，消防员与大火搏斗了40分钟才将其控制住，但这部电影中霍格沃茨之战的高潮部分的中心布景遭到严重损坏。后来证实，这场火灾被夸大了，并且受到损坏的布景无论如何都需要被重建，以便在另一场景中使用。当时有些演员仍然在工作室拍摄，但该电影的主要明星——丹尼尔·雷德克里夫（哈利）、艾玛·沃森（赫敏）或鲁伯特·格林特（罗恩·韦斯利）——都没有参与。没有人受伤。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It was reported that a huge blaze wrecked the Hogwarts set after a battle scene went spectacularly wrong . According to the report , explosives used in action sequences set light to scenery for the wizardry school , and that firefighters battled for 40 minutes to bring the flames under control but the set - centerpiece for the film 's Battle of Hogwarts climax - was left badly damaged . It was later confirmed that the fire was greatly exaggerated , and that the set that had been damaged was going to need be rebuilt anyway for use in another scene . Some actors were still filming at the studio but none of the movie 's biggest stars - Daniel Radcliffe ( Harry ) , Emma Watson ( Hermione ) or Rupert Grint ( Ron Weasley ) - were involved . No one was injured .

source: I look around like you do , Thomas , and wonder who the next star will be . I keep thinking there must be someone out there that can make me say " yes , that 's what I think ... " , but I have n't heard him/her yet . Conservative ideas are more appealing than liberal ideas -- someone just has to be able to unpack them so the average person " gets it . " Liberals have it easy , they just say what they are going to do for you -- we have to explain how it 's better to do it for yourself .
domestication: 我和你一样，托马斯，环顾四周，想知道下一个明星会是谁。我一直在想，一定有个人能让我说“没错，就是这个意思”，但到目前还没听到。保守的想法比自由的想法更有吸引力，只是有人需要把它们解释清楚，让普通人也能明白。自由派的人们很轻松，他们只需要说他们将为你做什么，而我们却需要解释为什么自己动手会更好。

source: I see it is like a holy trinity , made up of users , designers and product owners . All working togethers a shared vision. nnThis model helps me much more than any other I 've seen. nI 've also seen it work elsewhere. nThere will always be tension in design . nThe push and pull of different perspectives can reveal beautiful designs. nnCertain tension can be bad . Like when we try to differentiate ourselves as designers through our designs , pulling the relationship apart. nI try to remember that we do n't own the designs . We 're not the ones who 'll have to live with it for years after we 've finished on the project. nnnn
domestication: 我觉得设计就像一个圣三位一体，由用户、设计师和产品所有者组成。他们一起朝着一个共同的愿景努力。这套模式比我见过的其他任何模式都更有帮助。我还看到它在其他地方成功运作过。设计总会有紧张的关系存在，不同的观点碰撞出来的结果可能是很漂亮的设计。但有些紧张是有害的，比如我们试图通过设计来彰显自己的与众不同，从而拉大自己和他人之间的距离。我提醒自己，我们并不拥有这些设计，最终还是会交给别人使用，我们做完项目后可能就不再关心了。

source: The screen is the same for all real purposes . It is technically a " new " part in that it is n't identical to the old , it 's a bit thinner and more efficient , but it 's the same resolution . The Glass is thinner though , and this amounts to a fair bit of the weight loss from one generation to the next . I still would n't suggest dropping it , but if it were to fall the iPad 2 certainly feels like it might stand a better chance to survive . Try not to drop it though .

source: Digital vs. analog : Many tubes are still entirely analog , meaning that they wo n't work with high-definition tuners or progressive-scan DVD players . An increasing number of direct-view tube TVs , however , can display high-definition sources . These sets still use the tube , an inherently analog display technology ( unlike plasma , LCD , DLP , and the rest ; see the following sections ) , but if they can accept and display high-definition and progressive-scan images , they qualify as honest-to-goodness HDTVs .
domestication: 数码和模拟之争：很多显像管电视仍然是完全的模拟产品，这意味着它们不能与高清晰度的调谐器或者进扫描DVD播放器配合使用。但是，越来越多的直视式显像管电视却可以显示高清晰度的画面。这些机器仍然使用显像管，一种天生就是模拟显示技术（与等离子、液晶、DLP等不同，见下面的章节），但是如果它们能够接受并显示高清晰度和进扫描图像，那么它们也算得上是真正的高清晰度电视。

source: As you wireframe the infographic , you will identify section breaks that help to tell the story . Most infographics online have a vertical flow , in which each section has a heading to distinguish it from the last . This gets boring fast . Organizing the data and sectioning off information without relying entirely on headings and color breaks is a good way to break the monotony .
domestication: 在制作信息图的时候，你需要找出合适的位置来分节，这样才能让数据的故事更好地展现出来。大多数在线信息图都是垂直布局，每个部分都有标题来与前一部分区分开来。但是这样很快就会让人感到枯燥。通过对数据进行整理和分段，而不是完全依赖标题和颜色的变化，可以有效地打破这种单调。这样不仅能增加信息图的可读性，还能使其更具视觉吸引力。
foreignization: 当你绘制信息图的线框图时，你将会找到章节间的断点，帮助讲述故事。大多数在线信息图具有垂直流程，每个章节都有一个标题来与上一个章节区分开来。这很快就会变得枯燥。组织数据并在不完全依赖标题和颜色断点的情况下对信息进行分段，是打破单调的好方法。

source: **32;2327;TOOLONG . SEC. 16 . The governor shall have power to grant reprieves , commutations and pardons , after conviction , for all offences except treason and cases of impeachment , subject to such regulations as may be provided by law . Upon conviction for treason , he shall have power to suspend the execution of the sentence until the case shall be reported to the general assembly at its next meeting , when the general assembly shall either grant a pardon , commute the sentence , direct the execution of the sentence , or grant a further reprieve . He shall have power to remit fines and forfeitures , under such regulations as may be prescribed by law ; and shall report to the general assembly , at its next meeting , each case of reprieve , commutation , or pardon granted , and the reasons therefor ; and also all persons in whose favor remission of fines and forfeitures shall have been made , and the several amounts remitted .
domestication: 州长有权在判决后对除叛国和弹劾案外的所有犯罪行为授予缓刑、减刑或特赦，但须遵守法律规定的相关规定。在被判定犯有叛国罪时，州长有权暂停执行判决，直到案件在下一次大会上被报告，此时大会将会进行审议并做出决定：要么特赦，要么减刑，要么执行原判决，要么继续缓刑。另外，州长有权在法律规定的范围内免除罚款和没收财产，并且必须在下一次大会上汇报每个被批准缓刑、减刑或特赦的案例，以及每个案例的理由，同时也需要报告所有因故免除罚款和没收财产的人员名单，以及具体的免除金额。
foreignization: 第32;2327;TOOLONG。 第16节。 州长有权在定罪后授予缓刑、减刑和赦免，对除叛国和弹劾案以外的所有罪行均有此权力，但须受法律规定的条例约束。 对于叛国罪的定罪，他有权暂停执行判决，直到案件被报告给在下一次会议上的州议会，此时州议会将赦免、减刑、执行判决或授予进一步缓刑。 他有权在法律规定的条例下免除罚款和没收；并应向州议会在其下一次会议上报告每个获准缓刑、减刑或赦免的案件及其理由；以及所有因减免罚款和没收而受到青睐的人，以及减免的金额。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

**32;2327;TOOLONG . SEC. 16 . The governor shall have power to grant reprieves , commutations and pardons , after conviction , for all offences except treason and cases of impeachment , subject to such regulations as may be provided by law . Upon conviction for treason , he shall have power to suspend the execution of the sentence until the case shall be reported to the general assembly at its next meeting , when the general assembly shall either grant a pardon , commute the sentence , direct the execution of the sentence , or grant a further reprieve . He shall have power to remit fines and forfeitures , under such regulations as may be prescribed by law ; and shall report to the general assembly , at its next meeting , each case of reprieve , commutation , or pardon granted , and the reasons therefor ; and also all persons in whose favor remission of fines and forfeitures shall have been made , and the several amounts remitted .

州长有权在判决后对除叛国和弹劾案外的所有犯罪行为授予缓刑、减刑或特赦，但须遵守法律规定的相关规定。在被判定犯有叛国罪时，州长有权暂停执行判决，直到案件在下一次大会上被报告，此时大会将会进行审议并做出决定：要么特赦，要么减刑，要么执行原判决，要么继续缓刑。另外，州长有权在法律规定的范围内免除罚款和没收财产，并且必须在下一次大会上汇报每个被批准缓刑、减刑或特赦的案例，以及每个案例的理由，同时也需要报告所有因故免除罚款和没收财产的人员名单，以及具体的免除金额。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

**32;2327;TOOLONG . SEC. 16 . The governor shall have power to grant reprieves , commutations and pardons , after conviction , for all offences except treason and cases of impeachment , subject to such regulations as may be provided by law . Upon conviction for treason , he shall have power to suspend the execution of the sentence until the case shall be reported to the general assembly at its next meeting , when the general assembly shall either grant a pardon , commute the sentence , direct the execution of the sentence , or grant a further reprieve . He shall have power to remit fines and forfeitures , under such regulations as may be prescribed by law ; and shall report to the general assembly , at its next meeting , each case of reprieve , commutation , or pardon granted , and the reasons therefor ; and also all persons in whose favor remission of fines and forfeitures shall have been made , and the several amounts remitted .

第32;2327;TOOLONG。 第16节。 州长有权在定罪后授予缓刑、减刑和赦免，对除叛国和弹劾案以外的所有罪行均有此权力，但须受法律规定的条例约束。 对于叛国罪的定罪，他有权暂停执行判决，直到案件被报告给在下一次会议上的州议会，此时州议会将赦免、减刑、执行判决或授予进一步缓刑。 他有权在法律规定的条例下免除罚款和没收；并应向州议会在其下一次会议上报告每个获准缓刑、减刑或赦免的案件及其理由；以及所有因减免罚款和没收而受到青睐的人，以及减免的金额。

source: The intelligence network continued to report throughout 1972 and 1973 on coup plotting activities . During 1972 the Station continued to monitor the group which might mount a successful coup , and it spent a significantly greater amount of time and effort penetrating this group than it had on previous groups . This group had originally come to the Station 's attention in October 1971 . By January 1972 the Station had successfully penetrated it and was in contact through an intermediary with its leader .
domestication: 情报网络在1972年和1973年继续报告关于政变阴谋活动的消息。在1972年，该站继续监视可能成功发动政变的团体，并且它在渗透这个团体上花费的时间和精力比以前的团体要多得多。这个团体最初是在1971年10月引起了该站的注意。到1972年1月，该站已经成功渗透其中，并通过一个中间人与其领导人取得了联系。他们对这个团体的监视非常紧密，始终保持着高度警惕，以便能够随时掌握他们的行动动向。通过这样的方式，他们能够更好地预测和应对可能出现的政变威胁。

source: Third , the left is utterly powerless . What I mean by this is that they must run a particular campaign if they expect to get any votes at all . Obama 's campaign was about as pathetic as you can get , and yet , he still earned 10 million fewer votes than he got last time around . It 's laughable , really . They have worked themselves into an ever-shrinking box . Our friends keep getting richer and smarter and have more kids . Their supporters get drugged up , die young , and do n't have kids . We have the demographic advantage . They 've already slaughtered millions of potential voters , and as time goes on , that gap , the abortion gap , is growing , because those aborted babies will never have children of their own . That 's what happens when you embrace the ideology of death rather than life . Your people end up dead .

source: All in all , there are over a dozen new themes and motifs to fill in the blank spots for Rohan , Gondor , Fangorn , Gandalf The White and Frodo . Very noticeable , and very appropriately , in the score is the extensive exploration of the Isengard material , whose 5/4 pattern is very invasive , spreads throughout the score and tries to take over other thematic material . Orchstration and composition of the theme are expanded as well , it 's not as isolated as in Fellowship anymore , it feels alot more active .
domestication: 总的来说，新增了十几个主题和乐句，用来填补罗汉、刚多尔、法戈恩、甘道夫白衣和弗罗多的空白。很明显，且非常恰当的是，伊森加德的音乐元素在配乐中被广泛发掘，其5/4的节奏模式十分强势，遍布整个配乐，并试图占领其他主题。管弦乐编曲和主题创作也更加丰富，不再像《魔戒：护戒使者》时那么孤立，感觉更有活力。这些元素的融合让音乐变得更加生动，像一匹脱缰的野马一样奔驰不止。
foreignization: 总的来说，罗汉、剛多爾、法貢、甘道夫白衣和弗羅多各自都有十几个新的主题和主旨來填补空白。很明显，在乐谱中，艾辛格德的元素被广泛探索，它的5/4拍子非常具有侵略性，遍布整个乐谱，并试图接管其他主题的素材。这个主题的编曲和创作也得到了扩展，它不再像《魔戒首部曲：魔戒再现》那样孤立，感觉上活跃了很多。

source: 14 . Do I need to do anything in order to stay in my existing Medicare Advantage Plan ? If it 's working for you , make sure to confirm that any changes in the plan are n't deal breakers for you . If your plan is among the few that does n't include prescription drug coverage , it 's important to review any changes to your drug plan and , if necessary , choose another .
domestication: 如果你已经有了一份适合自己的医疗保险计划，那么你就不需要做任何事，只要确认一下下一年这个计划是否有任何变化，如果这些变化不会对你造成影响，那就没问题了。但是如果你的计划不包括处方药覆盖的话，你就需要检查一下药物计划的变化，并在必要时选择其他保险计划。一般来说，只要稍微留意一下你的保险计划，其他时候都不需要操心的。

The message " the majority of guests in this room reuse their towels " resulted in a 41 percent increase , he said .

source: During the past 30 years , we have developed a two-pronged analysis for evaluating the validity of a premarital agreement . Under the first prong , the court must decide whether the agreement provides a fair and reasonable provision for the party not seeking enforcement of the agreement . If the court makes this finding , then the analysis ends and the agreement may be validated . If the agreement is not fair , the court must invoke the second prong and decide : ( A ) whether full disclosure has been made by the parties of the amount , character , and value of the property involved , and ( B ) whether the agreement was entered into intelligently and voluntarily on independent advice and with full knowledge by both spouses of their rights .
domestication: 过去三十年里，我们形成了一套双重分析法来评估婚前协议的有效性。第一步，法院必须判定协议是否为不执行协议的一方提供了公平合理的赔偿。如果法院做出了这个判定，那么分析就结束了，协议可以被确认有效。如果协议不公平，法院就必须开始第二步，决定两个问题：一是当事人是否充分披露了相关财产的数量、性质和价值，二是协议是否是在双方都得到独立建议和充分了解自己权利的情况下自愿签订的。简单说，就是看协议是否公平，是否双方都是明眼人。如果公平，而且双方都是有备而来的，那协议就算数。如果不公平，就得仔细看看是不是双方都把家底儿摊开了讲清楚了，是不是都是心明眼亮地签的字。
foreignization: 在过去的30年里，我们已经发展出一种双重分析方法来评估婚前协议的有效性。在第一部分中，法院必须决定该协议是否为不寻求执行协议的当事人提供了公平和合理的规定。如果法院得出这一结论，则分析结束，协议可以得到确认。如果该协议不公平，法院必须采用第二部分并决定：（A）各方是否已充分披露所涉及财产的金额、性质和价值，（B）协议是否是在双方都有充分知识和独立建议下，自愿地达成的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

During the past 30 years , we have developed a two-pronged analysis for evaluating the validity of a premarital agreement . Under the first prong , the court must decide whether the agreement provides a fair and reasonable provision for the party not seeking enforcement of the agreement . If the court makes this finding , then the analysis ends and the agreement may be validated . If the agreement is not fair , the court must invoke the second prong and decide : ( A ) whether full disclosure has been made by the parties of the amount , character , and value of the property involved , and ( B ) whether the agreement was entered into intelligently and voluntarily on independent advice and with full knowledge by both spouses of their rights .

过去三十年里，我们形成了一套双重分析法来评估婚前协议的有效性。第一步，法院必须判定协议是否为不执行协议的一方提供了公平合理的赔偿。如果法院做出了这个判定，那么分析就结束了，协议可以被确认有效。如果协议不公平，法院就必须开始第二步，决定两个问题：一是当事人是否充分披露了相关财产的数量、性质和价值，二是协议是否是在双方都得到独立建议和充分了解自己权利的情况下自愿签订的。简单说，就是看协议是否公平，是否双方都是明眼人。如果公平，而且双方都是有备而来的，那协议就算数。如果不公平，就得仔细看看是不是双方都把家底儿摊开了讲清楚了，是不是都是心明眼亮地签的字。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

During the past 30 years , we have developed a two-pronged analysis for evaluating the validity of a premarital agreement . Under the first prong , the court must decide whether the agreement provides a fair and reasonable provision for the party not seeking enforcement of the agreement . If the court makes this finding , then the analysis ends and the agreement may be validated . If the agreement is not fair , the court must invoke the second prong and decide : ( A ) whether full disclosure has been made by the parties of the amount , character , and value of the property involved , and ( B ) whether the agreement was entered into intelligently and voluntarily on independent advice and with full knowledge by both spouses of their rights .
在过去的30年里，我们已经发展出一种双重分析方法来评估婚前协议的有效性。在第一部分中，法院必须决定该协议是否为不寻求执行协议的当事人提供了公平和合理的规定。如果法院得出这一结论，则分析结束，协议可以得到确认。如果该协议不公平，法院必须采用第二部分并决定：（A）各方是否已充分披露所涉及财产的金额、性质和价值，（B）协议是否是在双方都有充分知识和独立建议下，自愿地达成的。

source: 2004 - Owens ? agent failed to meet a free agency deadline in March , making him ineligible to become a free agent . Because they retained his rights , the 49ers then traded him to the Baltimore Ravens , but Owens refused to report to his new team . He expressed his desire to play in Philadelphia , and filed a grievance , claiming he should be granted free agency . After a series of negotiations , a deal was worked out between the three teams which sent Owens to Philadelphia where he signed a seven-year , $49 million deal against the advice of the players ? union .
domestication: 二零零四年，欧文斯的经纪人错过了三月份的自由球员截止日期，这意味着欧文斯没法成为自由球员。由于旧金山49人队保留了他的权利，他们随后把他交易到了巴尔的摩乌鸦队，但欧文斯拒绝加入新队。他表示自己想去费城老鹰队打球，并提交了申诉，认为应该给他自由球员的资格。在经过一系列谈判之后，三个队伍之间达成了协议，将欧文斯送到费城老鹰队，在那里他签订了一份七年四千九百万美元的合同，尽管球员工会不建议这么做。

source: While this book is a complete and cohesive work of art , many of its component stories could stand alone as independent pieces of literature ( in fact , I first encountered the title story in an anthology ) . source: Listen to an acute exchange of dialogue between the son Jack ( Hunter McCracken ) and his father ( Brad Pitt ) . " I was a little hard on you sometimes , " Mr. Brien says , and Jack replies : " It 's your house . You can do what you want to . " Jack is defending his father against himself . That 's how you grow up . And it all happens in this blink of a lifetime , surrounded by the realms of unimaginable time and space .

source: One day bled into two , and then into three , until Harry had lost count . They were at another radio interview , and all he wanted to do was go home , crawl into bed , and pretend as if the world did n't exist . But no , the grating voice of the interviewer was scratching at his nerves , and a deep-rooted headache had settled into the back of his neck ; his temples throbbing every time he deigned to partake in the conversation .
domestication: 日子一天天混在一起，时间变得模糊不清，哈利已经完全失去了时间的概念。他们又来到了另一个电台采访现场，他只想回家，爬上床，假装世界不存在。但是没有那么简单，那个主持人的声音像指甲划黑板一样刺耳，让他的神经紧绷。而且，他头部深处开始隐隐作痛，每次他不得不参加对话时，太阳穴就像要爆炸了一样跳动。
foreignization: 一天变成了两天，然后变成了三天，直到哈利失去了时间概念。他们又参加了另一档广播节目采访，而他唯一想做的事情就是回家，钻进床里，装作世界不存在一样。但是，不，那个采访者的刺耳声音却在折磨他的神经，一种根深蒂固的头痛已经在他的颈后扎根；每当他屈尊参与对话时，太阳穴都在疼痛。

source: By late 1972 , the Chilean Ministry of the Economy estimated that almost one-third of the diesel trucks at Chuquicamata Copper Mine , 30 percent of the privately owned city buses , 21 percent of all taxis , and 33 percent of state-owned buses in Chile could not operate because of the lack of spare parts or tires . In overall terms , the value of United States machinery and transport equipment exported to Chile by U.S. firms declined from $152.6 million in 1970 to $110 million in 1971 .
domestication: 到了一九七二年底，智利经济部估计，大约有三分之一的柴油卡车无法在奇瓦伊卡马塔铜矿正常运作，私人所有的城市公交车中也有百分之三十因为缺少零件或轮胎无法运行，一般出租车有百分之二十一没法儿开动，国有的公交车更是有三分之一陷入停摆状态。总体而言，美国公司出口到智利的机械和交通设备从一九七零年的１５６０万美元暴跌到７１年的１１００万美元。
foreignization: 截至 1972 年底，智利经济部估计，智利查基卡马塔铜矿的大约三分之一的柴油卡车，30% 的私人拥有的城市公交车，21% 的出租车和智利 33% 的国有巴士由于缺乏零件或轮胎而无法运行。总体而言，美国公司从 1970 年的 1.526 亿美元到 1971 年的 1.1 亿美元的机器和运输设备出口到智利的价值下降了。

In overall terms , the value of United States machinery and transport equipment exported to Chile by U.S. firms declined from $152.6 million in 1970 to $110 million in 1971 .

source: My wife ( Chinese ) ate some ramen the other day prepared by a Chinese owned ramen restaurant ( her cousin ) . She liked it but said- " does n't taste Japanese-it tastes like Chinese soup " . So to understand cooking that has a deep cultural rooting , you have to go beyond your own culture . Italian or Japanese .
domestication: 我老婆那天吃了她堂兄开的中餐馆做的拉面，她说还不错，就是“没有日本味儿，吃起来就像中国汤”。所以，要想真正理解那些深深扎根于文化中的烹饪艺术，就必须跳出自己的文化圈子。无论是意大利菜还是日本料理，都有其独特的文化底蕴和历史传承。只有跨越自己的文化界限，去体验和了解其他文化的烹饪之道，才能真正品尝到其中的真谛。
foreignization: 我妻子（中国人）前几天吃了一些由一家中国老板的拉面餐厅（她的表弟）准备的拉面。她喜欢它，但她说 - “不像日本味道 - 味道像中国汤”。所以，要理解有着深厚文化根源的烹饪，你必须超越自己的文化。不管是意大利还是日本。

source: I know firsthand that body image and presentation of the body are wed to corporate interest . Though most porn studios and producers have proved compassionate and kind , one studio owner once assured me that I needed to lose weight if I wanted to continue working , and another gently asked me to do steroids . They had perceptions of what the public wants to see , and pressured me into conforming to that image .
domestication: 我深有体会，身体形象和外貌往往与商业利益密不可分。尽管大多数成人影片公司和制片人都很通情达理，也有一些好心，但也曾经有一家公司的老板跟我说，如果想要继续在这个行业工作，就必须减肥，还有一个制片人委婉地让我去用激素。而他们的出发点无非是想迎合大众的口味，逼迫你去符合他们心目中的理想模样。
foreignization: 我亲身体验到，身体形象和身体表现与商业利益密切相关。尽管大多数色情片制作室和制片人已被证明是富有同情心和仁慈的，但有一位工作室老板曾经向我保证，如果我想继续工作，我需要减肥，而另一位则温柔地让我使用类固醇。他们认为公众想要看到某种特定的形象，并迫使我遵守那种形象。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I know firsthand that body image and presentation of the body are wed to corporate interest . Though most porn studios and producers have proved compassionate and kind , one studio owner once assured me that I needed to lose weight if I wanted to continue working , and another gently asked me to do steroids . They had perceptions of what the public wants to see , and pressured me into conforming to that image .
我深有体会，身体形象和外貌往往与商业利益密不可分。尽管大多数成人影片公司和制片人都很通情达理，也有一些好心，但也曾经有一家公司的老板跟我说，如果想要继续在这个行业工作，就必须减肥，还有一个制片人委婉地让我去用激素。而他们的出发点无非是想迎合大众的口味，逼迫你去符合他们心目中的理想模样。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I know firsthand that body image and presentation of the body are wed to corporate interest . Though most porn studios and producers have proved compassionate and kind , one studio owner once assured me that I needed to lose weight if I wanted to continue working , and another gently asked me to do steroids . They had perceptions of what the public wants to see , and pressured me into conforming to that image .
我亲身体验到，身体形象和身体表现与商业利益密切相关。尽管大多数色情片制作室和制片人已被证明是富有同情心和仁慈的，但有一位工作室老板曾经向我保证，如果我想继续工作，我需要减肥，而另一位则温柔地让我使用类固醇。他们认为公众想要看到某种特定的形象，并迫使我遵守那种形象。

source: Having described the skills you need to perform on test day , now I will tell you how to develop them . It is very simple : you practice . Not quite a revelation , is it ? During your law school career , most of you studied from your professors ' sample exams . When you study from past exams , you get a sense of the type of questions asked and what is expected of you . Moreover , you get familiar with the style of the exam . The MPT is no different . Once again , you must study from past exams .
domestication: 好了，既然说了考试那天你需要具备的那些技能，现在就来说说怎么培养这些技能。其实很简单：你只要多练习就行了，这也不是什么新鲜事儿吧？在读法学院的时候，大多数人都是通过教授出的试卷来学习的。通过这些过去的试题，你能大致了解到题型和自己的任务。而且，你也能慢慢熟悉考试的风格。MPT也不例外，你同样需要通过往年真题来学习。这不仅可以让你对考题类型有所了解，还能让你更好地适应考试的节奏。
foreignization: 介绍了在考试当天需要展现的技能后，现在我将告诉你如何培养这些技能。这非常简单：你练习。不算什么启示，对吧？在你的法学院生涯中，你们大多数人都通过教授的样本考试学习。当你从过去的考试中学习时，你会感受到被问及的问题类型以及对你的期望。此外，你会熟悉考试的风格。MPT也不例外。同样，你必须从过去的考试中学习。

source: I think that football is quite apt . There are so many quarterbacks who receive the tremendous training that the American football system affords . Yet only a select few can actually learn the skill of an NFL quarterback . Hence , your statement that ANY SKILL CAN BE learned is defied by your own analogy . Not any skill can be learned such as the skill of an NFL quarterback . A certain talent or inclination must exist at some sort of extreme level . In the case of sushi , that inclination may very well be cultural . In the Japanese culture is a deep rooted sense of " mysticism " related to the shinto and Zen Buddhist traditions and includes a cultural attentiveness to elegance , mindfulness , and an array of spiritual compenents . I and others do n't consider this silly .
domestication: 我觉得足球确实是个很合适的例子。你看，在美国足球系统下接受过高强度训练的四分卫有很多，但真正能掌握NFL四分卫技能的人却寥寥无几。这也就是说，你的“任何技能都可以学会”的说法被你自己的比喻给驳斥了，并不是任何技能都能学会，比如说NFL四分卫的技能就需要有一定的天赋或倾向，而且这种天赋或倾向必须达到某种极高的水平。对于寿司来说，这种倾向可能与文化有关。在日本文化中，有着深厚的神秘主义情结，这与神道教和禅宗佛教传统有关，包括对优雅、正念和各种精神元素的文化关注。 我们并不认为这些都是无稽之谈。
foreignization: 我认为足球很合适。有这么多四分卫接受美国橄榄球体系提供的巨大训练。然而，只有少数人实际上能够学习NFL四分卫的技能。因此，你的陈述ANY SKILL CAN BE学到了与你自己的类比相矛盾。不是任何技能都可以学习，比如NFL四分卫的技能。必须在某种程度上存在一定的天赋或倾向。在寿司的例子中，这种倾向可能确实是文化的。在日本文化中，有与神道和禅宗佛教传统相关的深厚的“神秘主义”情感，包括对优雅、正念和一系列精神组成部分的文化关注。我和其他人并不认为这是愚蠢的。

source: Stasinopoulos -- who along with Miller once tried to found a student life blog to compete with Very Noice , The Voice 's blog where the problematic post appeared -- said she thought that The Voice did not go far enough in retracting the post . " I do n't understand why the post is still up , " she said .
domestication: 斯塔西诺波洛斯曾经和米勒一起尝试创办一个学生生活博客来与《声音报》的博客Very Noice竞争，那篇有问题的帖子就是出现在后者。斯塔西诺波洛斯表示，她觉得《声音报》在撤回该帖子方面没有做够。“我不明白为什么那篇帖子还没被删除，”她说。这件事让她颇有微词，觉得《声音报》没能完全解决问题。

source: As investors , we would all like to beat the market handily , and we would all like to pick " great " investments on instinct . However , while intuition is undoubtedly a part of the process of investing , it is just part of the process . As investors , it is not surprising that we focus so much of our energy and efforts on investment philosophies and strategies , and so little on the investment process . It is far more interesting to read about how Peter Lynch picks stocks and what makes Warren Buffett a valuable investor , than it is to talk about the steps involved in creating a portfolio or in executing trades . Though it does not get sufficient attention , understanding the investment process is critical for every investor for several reasons :
domestication: 作为投资者，我们都想轻松打败市场，并凭直觉选出“好”投资。但是，虽然直觉无疑是投资过程的一部分，但仅仅是其中一部分。作为投资者，我们如此专注于投资理念和策略，却忽视了投资过程，这并不奇怪。阅读彼得·林奇如何挑选股票和沃伦·巴菲特成功的秘诀远比讨论创建投资组合或执行交易的步骤更有趣。尽管如此，了解投资过程对每个投资者来说都至关重要，原因有几点：
foreignization: 作为投资者，我们都希望轻松地战胜市场，我们都希望凭借直觉挑选“伟大的”投资。然而，虽然直觉无疑是投资过程的一部分，但它只是整个过程的一部分。作为投资者，我们如此专注于投资理念和策略，并且在投资过程上投入如此之少的精力，这并不令人惊讶。阅读彼得·林奇如何挑选股票以及沃伦·巴菲特成为一名有价值的投资者的原因比讨论创建投资组合或执行交易的步骤要有趣得多。尽管没有得到足够的关注，但了解投资流程对于每个投资者来说是至关重要的，主要有以下几个原因：

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As investors , we would all like to beat the market handily , and we would all like to pick " great " investments on instinct . However , while intuition is undoubtedly a part of the process of investing , it is just part of the process . As investors , it is not surprising that we focus so much of our energy and efforts on investment philosophies and strategies , and so little on the investment process . It is far more interesting to read about how Peter Lynch picks stocks and what makes Warren Buffett a valuable investor , than it is to talk about the steps involved in creating a portfolio or in executing trades . Though it does not get sufficient attention , understanding the investment process is critical for every investor for several reasons :

source: Thanks , that 's my experience as well . So the range of posts : Some people have had acceptable sushi prepared by non-Japanese chefs , many have preferred Japanese chefs . Yuba has Chinese chefs that seem to do a great job , but the food perhaps diverges from Japanese culture in some ways , but has a wonderful quality nonetheless . Someone had Korean chef made sushi that was good . Someone felt that the chef should be at least trained well in Japan , regardless of whether they were Japanese or not . Others felt that there is something not so desirable about a certain kind of exclusivity or preciousness applied to sushi of a particular type . Some people felt that offerings at Safeway and other more affordable versions of sushi were quite sufficient . Others talked of an almost spiritual aspect of food preparation . Very nice dialogue . Thanks .
domestication: 我也有过类似的经历。关于寿司的讨论，人们有不同的看法，有些人认为由非日本厨师制作的寿司还不错，但更多的人还是偏爱由日本厨师制作的。像Yuba这种有中国厨师的店，做出的寿司虽然可能在某些方面偏离了传统的日本风味，但仍然具有很高的品质。有人尝过韩国厨师制作的寿司，觉得很好吃。也有人认为，只要厨师在日本接受过良好的训练，无论他们的国籍是什么，都可以制作出好吃的寿司。还有人觉得，对于某种类型的寿司来说，过于强调排他性或特殊性并不一定是好事。有些人认为，在Safeway和其他更便宜的寿司店买到的寿司已经足够好了。另外，有人谈到了食物制作中几乎是精神层面的体验。非常棒的对话，谢谢大家。
foreignization: 谢谢，你的经历和我一样。所以关于帖子的范围：有些人被非日本厨师制作的可接受的寿司，很多人更喜欢日本厨师。Yuba有中国厨师，似乎做得很好，但食物也许在某些方面偏离了日本文化，但是仍然具有极好的质量。有人吃过韩国厨师制作的寿司，味道不错。有人觉得厨师应该至少在日本得到良好的训练，无论他们是否是日本人。其他人觉得，对于某种特定类型的寿司，有一种不太理想的排他性或珍贵性。有些人觉得Safeway和其他更廉价版本的寿司非常足够。其他人谈到了一种几乎是精神层面的食物准备。非常好的对话，谢谢。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Thanks , that 's my experience as well . So the range of posts : Some people have had acceptable sushi prepared by non-Japanese chefs , many have preferred Japanese chefs . Yuba has Chinese chefs that seem to do a great job , but the food perhaps diverges from Japanese culture in some ways , but has a wonderful quality nonetheless . Someone had Korean chef made sushi that was good . Someone felt that the chef should be at least trained well in Japan , regardless of whether they were Japanese or not . Others felt that there is something not so desirable about a certain kind of exclusivity or preciousness applied to sushi of a particular type . Some people felt that offerings at Safeway and other more affordable versions of sushi were quite sufficient . Others talked of an almost spiritual aspect of food preparation . Very nice dialogue . Thanks .

source: For me , my IPhone , besides being one of the best toys I 've ever had , quickly became an essential tool I ca n't do without . domestication: 法兰克·辛纳特拉是有史以来销量最高的独唱歌手之一，仅有埃尔维斯·普雷斯利和迈克尔·杰克逊能与他相提并论。他独特的爵士风格，让他的音乐在国际上长久不衰，尽管新一代人引入了各种新潮流、新时尚和新创新，但他的地位依然稳固。在他超过七十张专辑和数百首单曲的职业生涯中，从30年代末到90年代中期，辛纳特拉始终深受人们的喜爱，他的音乐流传至今。

source: An ultra-Orthodox Jewish man is seen through a damaged car window after a rocket fired from Gaza landed in the southern city of Ashdod . domestication: 一个极端保守的犹太人从一辆车子破碎的窗户里往外看，刚才有一枚来自加沙的火箭落在以色列南部城市阿什杜德。据以军方说，他们已经开始征召1.6万预备役士兵，这也预示着与加沙的巴勒斯坦武装分子之间的冲突可能会进一步升级。

source: Chicago , Indiana , Atlanta and obviously Orlando are all on the decline , whether through injuries or rebuilding , compared to where they were last season . The Boston Celtics give the distinct impression that they 're going to need the whole regular season , if it 's even still possible , to resemble the team that so troubled Miami last spring . The reality is that the Knicks ' conference , unlike what the aforementioned Mavs had to navigate in the annually unforgiving West , offers a real opportunity to snag a top-two seed and potentially avoid the Heat until the conference finals .
domestication: 芝加哥、印第安纳波利斯、亚特兰大和奥兰多这些队都比去年要差了，这么多球队的表现下滑要么是因为受伤，要么是正在重建。波士顿凯尔特人似乎需要整个常规赛的时间来恢复到去年春天那支让迈阿密热火头疼的状态。然而，尼克斯所在的东部联盟与每年都竞争激烈的西部联盟不同，为他们提供了一个机会，可以争夺前两名种子，甚至有可能直到东部决赛才会遇到热火。

source: The sweet 1940 Lannonstone ranch we 're hoping to buy has not only one , but TWO lovely , vintage pink bathrooms in it ! The main bath has pink tile with black trim , and the master has , get this , black tile with pink trim and fixtures ( plus a pink trimmed , diamond gridded , tall casement window over the tank ) . Gorgeous . Lots of other vintage goodies too -- like a yellow and turquoise tiled kitchen with gridded floor-to-ceiling picture window in a nook overlooking the backyard , 4-season room with 3 walls of windows and french doors off the dining room , and an offset detached garage ( on an angle on the property ) . Amazeballs . I hope we get it . I can only imagine how just about anyone else would rip out all these fantastic finds to update and flip . No updates needed ! Well , maybe some MCM vintage wallpaper
domestication: 我们正希望购买的1940年兰农斯通牧场有一点特别可爱，不仅有一间，还有两间古董粉红色浴室！主卫有粉红色的瓷砖配上黑边，而主卧的设计更是别具一格，黑色的瓷砖配上粉红色的边框和五金件（另外还有一个粉红色的菱格高窗）。简直太漂亮了！里面还有很多其他的复古宝贝，比如黄蓝相间的厨房瓷砖，地板到天花板的格子窗户，餐厅旁边四季阳房有三面都是窗户和法式门，还有一个偏置的独立车库（在院子里角落处）。这简直就是梦想家园！我真希望能买到它，其他人可能会把这些精美的发现全部拆掉然后改造成现代风格来出售。但我觉得根本不需要更新，只许需要一些中世纪现代风格的复古壁纸就完美了！

source: " Unless something can be measured , it can not be improved , " Kelly wrote . " So we are on a quest to collect as many personal tools that will assist us in quantifiable measurement of ourselves . We welcome tools that help us see and understand bodies and minds so that we can figure out what humans are here for . "
domestication: “如果不能衡量，就无法改进。”凯利写道。于是，我们踏上了寻找个人工具的旅程，这些工具可以帮助我们量化测量自己。我们欢迎任何能让我们更好地了解自己的身体和思想的工具，只有这样，我们才能弄清楚人类到底是为了什么而存在的。

source: The parties that inspired the film are based on those thrown by co-director/writer Peter Huyck in and around his southern Californian home . These bashes have included Trekkie , pirate and jailbreak themes where Huyck and up to 100 guests take over venues and don costumes , from Star Trek gear to prison jumpsuits . See more  Quotes
domestication: 这部电影的灵感来自联合导演兼编剧彼得·赫克在他位于南加州的家里和周边地区举办的派对。这些派对的主题包括星际迷航、海盗和越狱等，彼得·赫克和多达100位客人会接管场地并穿上各种服装，从《星际迷航》的制服到监狱的囚衣等应有尽有。你想知道更多吗？可以去看看这些名言。
foreignization: 电影中灵感的派对以联合导演/编剧彼得·海克在他南加州家里和周边地区所举办的派对为基础。 这些派对包括Trekkie，海盗和越狱主题，在那里，海克和最多100位客人接管场地并穿着从星际迷航装备到囚服的服装。 查看更多 引语

The parties that inspired the film are based on those thrown by co-director/writer Peter Huyck in and around his southern Californian home . These bashes have included Trekkie , pirate and jailbreak themes where Huyck and up to 100 guests take over venues and don costumes , from Star Trek gear to prison jumpsuits . See more  Quotes
这部电影的灵感来自联合导演兼编剧彼得·赫克在他位于南加州的家里和周边地区举办的派对。这些派对的主题包括星际迷航、海盗和越狱等，彼得·赫克和多达100位客人会接管场地并穿上各种服装，从《星际迷航》的制服到监狱的囚衣等应有尽有。你想知道更多吗？可以去看看这些名言。

source: This access plan is called Phase One . In Phase One , residents will be transported to the barrier island on a Toms River Regional school bus , allowed 60 minutes to gather essential items that can fit in a suitcase on your lap , and then be escorted out . Residents are essentially entering their homes at their own risk , according to the announcement .

source: Operating performance for a company that is this highly leveraged is very important in this economy . United Rentals ' free cash flow is negative and is expected to remain negative for the remainder of the 2012 . L ooking at the Interest Coverage and Quick Ratios of the company , there is a risk for investors that the company could face trouble servicing its debt ( if the market sees rental rate declines ) , considering that its operating profits or current assets alone are not high enough to satisfy its interest obligations .
domestication: 像这样的高杠杆公司，在这种经济形势下，经营业绩至关重要。United Rentals的自由现金流为负，并预计在2012年剩余时间里继续为负。观察该公司的利息覆盖率和速动比率，我们可以看出投资者存在一定风险：如果市场见证租赁价格下降，该公司可能会面临偿还债务的困难，因为其营业利润或当前资产根本不足以满足其支付利息的义务。
foreignization: 对于一家杠杆这么高的公司来说，在这样的经济环境中，经营业绩非常重要。 United Rentals 的自由现金流是负数，并且预计在2012年的剩余时间内仍然保持负数。查看该公司的息税前利润覆盖率和快速比率，可以看出投资者有可能面临公司难以服务其债务（如果市场出现租赁费下降）的风险，考虑到其营业利润或当前资产单独不足以满足其利息义务。

source: One final NIE on Chile was issued prior to Allende 's overthrow in September 1973 . That NIE focused on the prospects for the consolidation of power by Allende 's regime . It concluded that at that juncture a political standoff seemed to be the most likely course of events in Chile . The NIE stated that Allende had not consolidated the power of his Marxist regime ; the bulk of low-income Chileans believed that he had improved their conditions and represented their interests ; and the growth in support for his coalition reflected his political ability as well as the popularity of his measures . The NIE did warn , however , that the growing polarization of the Chilean society was wearing away the Chilean predilection for political compromise . Nevertheless , the analysts predicted that there was only an outside chance that the military would move to force Allende from office .
domestication: 在阿连德于1973年9月被推翻之前，美国还发布了最后一份关于智利的国家情報估計報告。這份報告關注的是阿連德政權鞏固權力的前景，結論是當時智利最可能出現政治僵局。報告稱，阿連德尚未鞏固他馬克思主義政權的權力，智利大部分低收入民眾認為他改善了自己的生活條件，代表了自己的利益，他的聯盟支持度的增長反映了他的政治能力以及他政策的受歡迎程度。然而，這份報告也警告說，智利社會日益兩極分化正侵蝕著智利人對政治妥協的偏好。無論如何，分析師預測軍方強迫阿連德下台的可能性不大，只有極小的機會。
foreignization: 在阿连德于1973年9月被推翻之前，曾发表了最后一份关于智利的NIE。那份NIE关注的是阿连德政权巩固权力的前景。它得出结论，在那时，一场政治僵局似乎是智利最可能出现的事件进程。该NIE指出，阿连德尚未巩固他马克思主义政权的权力；绝大多数低收入智利人认为，他已经改善了他们的处境并代表了他们的利益；以及他联盟的支持度增长反映了他的政治能力，以及他的措施的受欢迎程度。然而，该NIE警告说，智利社会日益两极分化正在削弱智利人对政治妥协的偏好。尽管如此，分析人士预测军方只有很小的几率会采取行动迫使阿连德离职。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

One final NIE on Chile was issued prior to Allende 's overthrow in September 1973 . That NIE focused on the prospects for the consolidation of power by Allende 's regime . It concluded that at that juncture a political standoff seemed to be the most likely course of events in Chile . The NIE stated that Allende had not consolidated the power of his Marxist regime ; the bulk of low-income Chileans believed that he had improved their conditions and represented their interests ; and the growth in support for his coalition reflected his political ability as well as the popularity of his measures . The NIE did warn , however , that the growing polarization of the Chilean society was wearing away the Chilean predilection for political compromise . Nevertheless , the analysts predicted that there was only an outside chance that the military would move to force Allende from office .

source: I co-host a community radio show about movies and I made a list of 2011 releases that I must catch up on in order to put together a proper top ten list . However , I was aghast to see that this list totaled around 30 films ! Also , many of these movies which qualify as 2011 releases wo n't open in my city until January at best . These would include A Dangerous Method and Shame . Your No. 1 film , A Separation , I had only heard about week ago ! I have no idea when it 's opening here in Ottawa !
domestication: 我主持一个关于电影的社区广播节目，我做了一个2011年上映的电影清单，这样我才能编制出一个妥当的十大电影排行榜。然而，当我看到这个清单有大约30部电影时，我感到非常震惊！而且，其中许多2011年的电影可能要到明年一月份才会在我的城市上映。这些电影包括《危险方法》和《耻辱》。你评为第一的电影《离婚纳德和西蒙》，我只是在一周前才听说！我完全不知道它什么时候会在渥太华上映！

source: Calls Ryan 's observations " Malarkey " . Did n't he just say , moments ago , he wants to get to the bottom of the truth ? Says EVERYTHING Ryan said was inaccurate . Blames Ryan for cutting embassy security . Blames Gov . Romney for making a political statement before the ambassador was known to be dead . Does n't understand why we look weak . Says Obama repaired alliances . Says Obama brought China and Russia together to pressure Iran . Says Ryan bets against America all the time .
domestication: 拜登说莱恩的看法都是胡扯，不是他刚才还说要查清事实真相吗？他还说莱恩说的每一句话都不准确，并且指责莱恩削减了大使馆的安保经费，还批评罗姆尼在大使遇害之前就已经开始做政治发言。拜登不明白为什么美国会给人一种软弱的感觉，他说奥巴马修复了盟友关系，让中国和俄罗斯联合起来对伊朗施压，莱恩总是在赌博，押注美国会失败。

source: A Couple of Monkeys is a group of marketing consultants helping small businesses and entrepreneurs like you reach their goals by absorbing ordinary marketing tasks that you do n't have the time or resources to tackle on your own . We save you time and money by providing a way for marketing to take an important role in your strategy , and allowing you and your team to get back to work actually running your business .
domestication: 有一家公司叫“一对猴子”，专门帮助像你这样的中小企业主和创业者们实现目标。他们的做法是接下那些平时让你头疼的营销杂事，你忙不过来或者没资源处理的那些事，他们都帮你搞定。这样一来，你既能节省时间，又能省点钱，还能腾出精力让营销在你的商业策略中发挥重要作用，你和你的团队就可以安心地去打理你的生意了。
foreignization: 一对猴子是一个市场顾问团队，帮助像您这样的中小企业和创业者通过接手您没有时间或资源独自解决的普通营销任务来实现您的目标。我们通过提供一种让营销在您的策略中扮演重要角色的方式为您节省时间和金钱，并使您和您的团队能够回到实际经营业务的岗位上。

一对猴子是一个市场顾问团队，帮助像您这样的中小企业和创业者通过接手您没有时间或资源独自解决的普通营销任务来实现您的目标。我们通过提供一种让营销在您的策略中扮演重要角色的方式为您节省时间和金钱，并使您和您的团队能够回到实际经营业务的岗位上。

source: The House 6 race illustrates the idea as well as any other . Whether Williams wins or Lawson wins will be determined by who turns out in a low-turnout election . If Williams wins the chances are that many Republicans will simply not vote in November . But more importantly , many of the grassroots " true Republicans " will not get out and work to turn out the Republican vote against Tine . He will get most of the Democrat vote and will thus have to pull only a few Unaffiliated voters , which he can probably do . Without a heavy conservative turnout , Tine wins . Simple as that .
domestication: 第六区的选举很好地说明了这一点。不管是威廉姆斯赢还是劳森赢，都取决于谁能在低投票率的选举中站出来。如果威廉姆斯赢了，很多共和党人可能会选择不在11月投票。但更重要的是，很多草根的“真正的共和党人”不会出来努力动员共和党人去对抗廷。他已经得到了大部分民主党人的支持，所以他只需要拉拢少数无党派选民就可以赢，这对他来说并不难。如果没有大量保守派选民出来投票，廷就会赢。这就是这么简单。
foreignization: 第六届众议院比赛也同样说明了这个观点。不管是威廉姆斯获胜还是劳森获胜，都将由谁在低投票率的选举中出席决定。如果威廉姆斯获胜，许多共和党人可能会简单地不在十一月投票。但更重要的是，许多草根的“真正的共和党人”不会出来努力动员共和党选民反对蒂恩。他将获得大部分民主党人的选票，因此只需要拉拢少数非隶属选民，他可能做得到。没有大量保守派选民的投票，蒂恩就会赢。就是这么简单。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The House 6 race illustrates the idea as well as any other . Whether Williams wins or Lawson wins will be determined by who turns out in a low-turnout election . If Williams wins the chances are that many Republicans will simply not vote in November . But more importantly , many of the grassroots " true Republicans " will not get out and work to turn out the Republican vote against Tine . He will get most of the Democrat vote and will thus have to pull only a few Unaffiliated voters , which he can probably do . Without a heavy conservative turnout , Tine wins . Simple as that .

source: Chinese Religion : Chinese Religion is not an organized church , but an amalgamation of different religions and beliefs including Taoism and Buddhism . Upon death , worshipers are judged . The good are sent either to a Buddhist paradise or a Tao dwelling place . The bad are sent to hell for a period of time and then reincarnated .
domestication: 中国的宗教不是一个有组织的教会，而是道教和佛教等各种不同的宗教和信仰的大杂烩。人死后，就会受到审判。好人或者会被送到佛教的极乐世界或者道教的修行之地。坏人则会被打入地狱，遭受一段时间的折磨后，再转世投胎，重新开始轮回。总之，这就是中国宗教中轮回与因果报应的循环。

source: Without a hardware time source , W32time is configured as an NTP type . You must reconfigure the MaxPosPhaseCorrection and MaxNegPhaseCorrection registry entries . The recommended value should be 15 minutes or even less , depending on time source , network condition , and security requirement . This requirement also applies to any reliable time source that is configured as the forest root time source in the time sync subnet . For more information about these registry entries , see the " Windows Time service registry entries " section in this article .

source: As humans , we like to try and remove awkwardness and conflict from every situation but it 's often inevitable . It 's better to understand that some situations will be unpleasant , accept that reality , and believe that a little discomfort now will save a lot of discomfort down the road . There will also be times when you 'll be surprised by someone 's interest , so it can help to have a few responses at the ready to avoid creating additional problems . Roger Gil elaborates :
domestication: 作为人，我们总是想方设法地避免尴尬和冲突，但有时候这就是无法避免的。我们还是接受这样一个事实吧：有些情况可能会很不愉快，但承认这个现实，并相信现在稍微难受一点可以避免以后更多的麻烦。有时候，你也会被别人的反应惊讶到，所以准备几个应对方案以避免制造更多问题也是有必要的。罗杰·吉尔还进一步解释道：

source: The smell was awful , a mixture of bad eggs and rotted cabbages . Barrels of slimy stuff stood on the floor ; jars of herbs , dried roots , and bright powders lined the walls ; bundles of feathers , strings of fangs , and snarled claws hung from the ceiling . He saw silver unicorn horns at twenty-one Galleons each and minuscule , glittery-black beetle eyes ( five Knuts a scoop ) .
domestication: 这味道真臭，简直是烂鸡蛋和腐烂的卷心菜混在一起的味道。地上摆满了发粘的东西，墙上一排排摆着装草药、干树根和五彩粉末的罐子，天花板上挂着羽毛、獠牙和弯曲的利爪。还有银色的独角兽角，每个要21加隆，還有黑乎乎的，闪闪发光的小甲虫眼珠，一把只要五个纳特。

source: I continue to find my iPad remarkably productive and productive in ways I would not have anticipated . It does indeed redefine how we can use computing so that it does the work we want to do with minimal impediments . I now leave my laptop at school and take my iPad back and forth since 80 or 90% of the time the iPad does all I need to do . I use it 3 or 4 hours a day .
domestication: 我越来越发现iPad在提高我的工作效率方面非常出色，而且常常出乎意料地帮我解决问题。它确实改变了我们使用电脑的方式，让我们能顺利地完成想做的事情，几乎没有任何阻碍。现在，我常常把笔记本电脑留在学校，只带iPad往返，因为大约80%到90%的情况下，iPad都能满足我的需求。我每天使用iPad大约3到4个小时。
foreignization: 我继续发现我的iPad在令人惊讶的程度上具有生产力和高效，并且是在我原本没有预料到的方式下。它确实重新定义了我们如何使用计算机，使其以最小的障碍来完成我们想要做的工作。我现在把我的笔记本电脑留在学校，然后带着我的iPad来回奔波，因为80%或者90%的时间，iPad都能满足我需要做的事情。我每天使用它3或4个小时。

source: When you 've played a game 115 times in 130 years , you 've probably collected some interesting history along the way , and Georgia-Auburn -- the most frequently played rivalry game south of the Mason-Dixon Line other than Virginia-North Carolina , which leads by a single contest -- is no different . Sometimes Georgia-Auburn is a coronation , as it was for the Dawgs in 1980 and 2002 and for the Tigers in 2004 and ' 10 . Over more than a century of matchups , though , it 's clear that the complete opposite outcome is just as likely -- in other words , a stunning upset of a highly ranked team by an unranked , unheralded spoiler .
domestication: 130年来，两队已经打了115场比赛，这中间肯定会产生一些有趣的历史，而佐治亚大学和奥本大学之间的这场竞争就是其中之一。这也是美国南方除了弗吉尼亚大学和北卡罗来纳大学的对抗外，最频繁的两队竞争。这种竞争有时就像加冕仪式一样，比如1980年和2002年佐治亚大学获胜，以及2004年和2010年奥本大学获胜。但在一个多世纪的比赛中，另一方面却完全相反，这也就是说，一支排名靠前的队伍可能会被一支排名靠后，默默无闻的黑马队打败。
foreignization: 当你在130年里玩了115次游戏时，你可能已经沿途收集了一些有趣的历史，而乔治亚州-奥本（Georgia-Auburn）-除了弗吉尼亚州-北卡罗来纳州（Virginia-North Carolina），后者以一场比赛领先-南部梅森-迪克森线（Mason-Dixon Line）以外最经常比赛的竞争对手之外-并没有不同。有时候，乔治亚州-奥本州（Georgia-Auburn）是一种加冕礼，就像1980年和2002年为Dawgs和2004年和'10年为老虎一样。在一个多世纪的配对中，尽管如此，很明显完全相反的结果同样可能-换句话说，高排名球队被无名小卒击败。

source: He 'll of course be wearing a specially designed pressure suit that will supply oxygen during his ascent and jump . During three minutes of freefall , he could reach up to 690 mph , which at those altitudes will exceed the speed of sound . As the atmosphere density increases , he 'll slow down to conventional descent speeds , deploy his parachute at about 3,000 feet , and land safely in the desert .
domestication: 他当然会穿着一套专门设计的加压服，这套服装可以在他上升和跳跃过程中供应氧气。在三分钟的自由落体过程中，他可能会达到每小时690英里的速度，这个速度在这种海拔高度下，已经超过了音速。随着大气密度的增加，他会减慢到常规的下降速度，在3000英尺左右展开降落伞，然后安全地降落在沙漠里。

source: There are plenty of people who pay attention to Daily Kos . They respect Daily Kos . Among politicians , there are people like Alan Grayson , Bernie Sanders , Darcy Burner , Al Franken , and so on who have written diaries here . Or they have quoted stories from Daily Kos . Or they have interns and assistants that follow DKos . Early in his career , President Obama was actually a member here .
domestication: Daily Kos 有很多人关注，也很受尊重。像阿兰·格雷森、伯尼·桑德斯、达西·伯纳、阿尔·弗兰肯等政客都曾在这里写过日记，或者引用过 Daily Kos 的报道，甚至还有一些政客让自己的实习生和助手关注 DKos 。奥巴马总统刚出道的时候，也是这里的会员呢。
foreignization: 有很多人关注每日科斯（Daily Kos），他们尊重每日科斯。在政客中，有像阿兰·格雷森（Alan Grayson）、伯尼·桑德斯（Bernie Sanders）、达西·伯纳（Darcy Burner）、阿尔·弗兰肯（Al Franken）等人曾在这里写过博客。或者他们引用过每日科斯的故事。或者他们有实习生和助手跟踪DKos。在他早期职业生涯中，奥巴马总统实际上是这里的成员。

source: Palestinian firefighters try to extinguish fire at a factory , which according to locals was hit by an Israeli air strike in Beit Lahia , northern Gaza Strip . domestication: 巴勒斯坦消防员正在试图扑灭北加沙地带贝特拉希亚工厂的大火，当地人称该工厂遭到了以色列的空袭。同时，埃及总理在访问哈马斯控制的加沙地带时誓言要加强开罗的努力来确保停火，并敦促世界各国领导人停止以色列在加沙的“侵略行为”。 -- 2012年11月16日，阿联社/盖蒂图片社摄影师穆罕默德·阿卜杜拍摄。

source: " I 'm not a wiki person who happened to go into encyclopedias , " Wales told the crowd at Oxford . " I 'm an encyclopedia person who happened to use a wiki . " So perhaps his belief that Wikipedia was written in the traditional way is n't surprising . Unfortunately , it is dangerous . If Wikipedia continues down this path of focusing on the encyclopedia at the expense of the wiki , it might end up not being much of either .
domestication: 威尔士在牛津的演讲中表示：“我不是一个碰巧会编辑百科全书的人，我是一个因为用维基而变成百科全书爱好者的。”因此，他认为维基百科应该按照传统方式撰写也就不足为奇了。但是，这种想法很危险。如果维基百科继续走这条路，只注重百科全书而忽视维基的特点，那么它最后可能既不是好的百科全书，也不是好的维基。
foreignization: “ 我不是一个碰巧进入百科全书的维基人， ” 韦尔斯在牛津对人群说。 “ 我是一个碰巧使用维基的百科全书人。 ” 所以他认为维基百科是用传统方式编写的这一信念也许并不令人惊讶。 不幸的是，这很危险。 如果维基百科继续走这条专注于百科全书而不是维基的道路，它可能最终会两者都不擅长。

messages_domestication.content:

If Wikipedia continues down this path of focusing on the encyclopedia at the expense of the wiki , it might end up not being much of either .

source: When Bryan met Jaime on a business trip six years ago , they immediately hit it off . The only problem was that he lived in Boston and she in Arkansas . Still , a long-distance friendship soon blossomed into a long-distance romance . Jaime , a single mom of three , knew the sacrifices Bryan would have to make if they were ever to marry , but on their first Christmas together , Bryan popped the question . " He told me how much he loved me and the kids , " she recalls -- and the rest is history !
domestication: 六年前，布莱恩出差的时候认识了杰米，两人一见如故。唯一的问题是他住在波士顿，而她住在阿肯色州。但尽管相隔千里，他们很快从朋友变成了恋人。杰米是个单身妈妈，有三个孩子，她知道如果他们结婚，布莱恩将会付出很多牺牲。然而，在他们的第一次圣诞节庆祝时，布莱恩向她求婚了。“他告诉我，他有多么爱我和孩子们”，杰米回忆道——剩下的就是历史了！他们的爱情就这样开花结果了。
foreignization: 当 Bryan 六年前出差时遇见 Jaime ，他们立刻产生了共鸣。 唯一的问题是他住在波士顿，她在阿肯色州。尽管如此，一段长距离的友谊很快就发展成了一段长距离的恋情。作为三个孩子的单身妈妈，Jaime 知道如果他们结婚，Bryan 将不得不做出的牺牲，但是他们一起过的第一个圣诞节，Bryan 向她求婚。 " 他告诉我他有多爱我和孩子们，" 她回忆说 -- 其余的都是历史！

source: Malaria is a serious risk to travelers in The Gambia . Travelers who become ill with a fever or flu-like illness while traveling in a malaria-risk area ( and for up to one year after returning home ) should seek prompt medical attention and tell the physician their travel history , as well as what anti-malarial medications they have been taking . For additional information on malaria , protection from insect bites , and anti-malarial drugs , visit the CDC website .
domestication: 在冈比亚，疟疾对旅行者来说是一个严重的威胁。旅行者在进入疟疾高发地区后，如果出现发烧或类似流感的症状，即使是在回国一年后，也应该立即寻求医疗帮助，并将自己的旅行史以及所服用的抗疟药告知医生。若想获取更多关于疟疾、防蚊措施和抗疟药物的信息，可以登录CDC网站。
foreignization: 疟疾是冈比亚旅行者的严重威胁。在疟疾风险地区（以及返回家乡后的一年内）旅行期间，生病并患上发烧或流感样疾病的旅行者，应该寻求立即的医疗救治，并将他们的旅行史以及正在服用的抗疟药告知医生。有关疟疾、避免被昆虫叮咬及抗疟药物的更多信息，请访问CDC网站。

source: Until now , you had to buy from either the Capitol or the Reprise catalog . Sinatra collections were one or the other . If you wanted to introduce his music to someone , you had to get one of each or skip an era . You want " New New , York , " " My Way , " or " That 's Life " ? You 're going to have to lose " Come Fly with Me , " " Witchcraft , " and " One for My Baby . " Two different labels ; two different catalogs . FINALLY , they got together so here you have Sinatra from 1953 ( " I 've got the World on a String " ) to " New York , New York . "
domestication: 到目前为止，你必须从Capitol或者Reprise目录中购买辛纳特拉的专辑，这两家公司各有一套自己的目录。如果你想向别人介绍他的音乐，你不得不买两套目录，否则就得跳过某个时代。你想要听《纽约，纽约》、《我的路》或者《生活就是这样》？那你就不得不放弃《和我一起飞》、《巫术》和《为我喝一杯》。因为有两个不同的唱片公司，就有两个不同的目录。终于，他们合作了，现在你可以听到从1953年的《我用一根弦拨动世界》（"I've Got the World on a String"）到《纽约，纽约》（"New York, New York"）的所有歌曲了。
foreignization: 直到现在，你不得不从Capitol或者Reprise目录购买。辛纳特拉的收藏品要么是来自前者，要么是来自后者。如果你想向别人介绍他的音乐，你不得不买两个或者跳过一个时代。你想要“New New , York，”“My Way，”或“That's Life”？你将不得不放弃“Come Fly with Me，”“Witchcraft，”和“One for My Baby。”两个不同的厂牌；两个不同的目录。最后，他们终于合作了，这样你就可以从1953年的“我拥有这个世界”（"I've got the World on a String"）到“纽约，纽约”（"New York , New York"）。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Until now , you had to buy from either the Capitol or the Reprise catalog . Sinatra collections were one or the other . If you wanted to introduce his music to someone , you had to get one of each or skip an era . You want " New New , York , " " My Way , " or " That 's Life " ? You 're going to have to lose " Come Fly with Me , " " Witchcraft , " and " One for My Baby . " Two different labels ; two different catalogs . FINALLY , they got together so here you have Sinatra from 1953 ( " I 've got the World on a String " ) to " New York , New York . "

source: What about crime , fraud , corruption ? A free society protects itself against these things rather easily . Normally , these types of people aggregate to institutions of power . Case in point , the global warming movement . There is absolutely no weight behind any of their absurd claims , and yet here we are . Why ? Because they are working through government . If they had to instead compete in the free market of ideas , we would 've recognized and rejected their baseless allegations immediately .
domestication: 那么，犯罪、诈骗和腐败怎么办？一个自由社会可以轻松地保护自己免受这些东西的侵害。通常，这些类型的人会聚集在权力机构周围。拿全球变暖运动来说吧，根本没有任何证据支持他们那些荒谬的说法，但为什么我们却到了这一步？这是因为他们是在利用政府来实现自己的目的。如果他们不得不在思想的自由市场上竞争，我们早就认识到并驳斥了他们毫无根据的指控。
foreignization: 那么犯罪、欺诈、腐败怎么办？一个自由社会很容易保护自己免受这些事情的影响。通常，这类人会聚集在权力机构中。例如，全球变暖运动。他们荒谬的说法根本没有任何根据，然而我们现在却面临这种情况。为什么？因为他们是通过政府工作的。如果他们不得不在思想自由市场竞争，我们就会立即认识并驳斥他们毫无根据的指控。

source: My last comment was sarcastic . This one is sincere . I 've been to Germany twice . Germany has a pretty high tax rate on the most wealthy . And yet when I was there there were no shortage of rich people driving their Lambourghinis around Berlin . Apparently it 's possible to have progressive taxation without driving the super-rich into penury .
domestication: 我之前的留言是讽刺的，这个是真心话。我去过德国两次，德国的税率对于富人来说真的很高。但是当我在那里的时候，我发现柏林街头豪车成群，根本没有看到富人因税率高而变得贫穷的迹象。看来，实行渐进式税制并不一定会让富豪们破产，对吧？
foreignization: 我之前的留言是讽刺的。这一个是真诚的。我去过德国两次。德国对富人有相对较高的税率。而当我在那里的时候，我看到有很多富人在柏林开着兰博基尼驾驶。很明显，有可能实施累进税而不至于让超级富豪落入贫穷。

source: The Obama campaign assembled an unprecedented , unified data base made up of information from pollsters , fundraisers , field workers , consumer databases , social-media and mobile contacts . They then fed that data into advanced predictive models that allowed them to target specific groups of voters with specialized messages , track how the electorate was moving as the campaign progressed , and guide the president to a second term .
domestication: 奥巴马竞选团队组建了一个前所未有的数据库，它由民意调查员、筹款人、基层工作人员、消费者数据库、社交媒体和手机联系人提供的信息组成。然后，他们将这些数据输入到先进的预测模型中，这使得他们能够根据不同投票群体的特点量身定制信息，追踪选举人在整个竞选过程中的动向，并最终帮助总统成功连任。他们利用大数据技术精准锁定目标人群，研究选民的心理和行为，通过社交媒体和移动通讯等渠道与选民建立直接联系，从而提高了竞选活动的针对性和有效性。

source: Even then , it seemed as if he could sense the landscape shifting , from red to green to blue . source: They found that questions about people 's concern for the future predict people 's motivational outlook . Specifically , Tory Higgins and his colleagues have distinguished between two broad motivational orientations . A promotion focus leads people to concentrate on potential positive things in the world and on the person they would ideally like to be . A prevention focus leads people to concentrate on potential negative things in the world and on their responsibilities .
domestication: 他们发现，关于人们对未来的关心可以预测人们的动机观念。具体来说，托里·希金斯和他的同事已经区分了两个广泛的动机取向。一种叫做“推进焦点”，让人们专注于世界上潜在的积极事物和他们理想中的自己。另一种叫做“防御焦点”，则让人们专注于世界上潜在的消极事物和自己的责任。这么说吧，有些人活得比较“乐观”，总是想着能不能更好，而有些人活得比较“谨慎”，总是担心会出什么错。
foreignization: 他们发现，关于人们对未来的关心可以预测人们的动机观。具体来说，Tory Higgins和他的同事已经区分了两种广泛的动机取向。一个促进重点导致人们集中在世界上的潜在积极事物上以及他们理想中想要成为的人。一个预防重点导致人们集中在世界上的潜在负面事物上以及他们的责任上。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

They found that questions about people 's concern for the future predict people 's motivational outlook . Specifically , Tory Higgins and his colleagues have distinguished between two broad motivational orientations . A promotion focus leads people to concentrate on potential positive things in the world and on the person they would ideally like to be . A prevention focus leads people to concentrate on potential negative things in the world and on their responsibilities .

source: Delete file(s) that are no longer needed ( such as from your desktop , Documents folder , or other Home folder locations ) , so they will no longer be backed up . You can also enter the Time Machine restore interface and find files that can be removed from the backup drive itself to conserve space . To do this , select the file(s) and from the Action pop-up menu ( gear icon ) in the Time Machine Finder window choose " Delete All Backups of ... " . Be sure to only delete files you are sure you wo n't need or want to restore later .
domestication: 删除那些不再需要的文件（比如桌面、文档文件夹或者其他家目录位置的文件），这样它们就不会被继续备份了。你还可以进入Time Machine恢复界面，在备份驱动器中找到可以移除的文件，以节省空间。要做到这一点，你可以选择文件，然后在Time Machine的Finder窗口中的操作弹出菜单（齿轮图标）中选择“删除所有备份”。一定要只删除你确定以后不会需要或不想恢复的文件。记住，防止万一，删除前还是要三思而后行。

source: Even after the decrease of the film thickness is ended , additional development is carried out for a prescribed amount of time in order to completely carry out the development . The period for the additional development needs to be accurately defined in order to carry out the development with good repeatability and with high efficiency . More specifically , if this period is too short , the development is insufficiently done . On the other hand , if this period is too long , excess development occurs and the efficiency of work is lowered .
domestication: 即使膜厚度的减少已经完成，还需要进行一段时间的额外开发，以便彻底完成开发。为了实现良好的重复性和高效率，必须准确地确定额外开发所需的时间。更具体地说，如果这个时期太短，开发就不能完全完成。而另一方面，如果这个时期太长，就会发生过度开发，工作效率就会降低。所以，必须找到一个合适的时长来进行额外开发，这样才能保证开发的质量和效率。
foreignization: 即使在膜厚度的减少已经结束后，也会进行额外的显影处理一段规定的时间，以便完全进行显影处理。为了实现良好的重复性和高效率地进行显影处理，需要准确定义额外显影处理的时期。更具体地说，如果这个时期太短，显影处理就做得不够。如果这个时期太长，就会发生过度显影，工作效率就会降低。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even after the decrease of the film thickness is ended , additional development is carried out for a prescribed amount of time in order to completely carry out the development . The period for the additional development needs to be accurately defined in order to carry out the development with good repeatability and with high efficiency . More specifically , if this period is too short , the development is insufficiently done . On the other hand , if this period is too long , excess development occurs and the efficiency of work is lowered .
即使膜厚度的减少已经完成，还需要进行一段时间的额外开发，以便彻底完成开发。为了实现良好的重复性和高效率，必须准确地确定额外开发所需的时间。更具体地说，如果这个时期太短，开发就不能完全完成。而另一方面，如果这个时期太长，就会发生过度开发，工作效率就会降低。所以，必须找到一个合适的时长来进行额外开发，这样才能保证开发的质量和效率。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even after the decrease of the film thickness is ended , additional development is carried out for a prescribed amount of time in order to completely carry out the development . The period for the additional development needs to be accurately defined in order to carry out the development with good repeatability and with high efficiency . More specifically , if this period is too short , the development is insufficiently done . On the other hand , if this period is too long , excess development occurs and the efficiency of work is lowered .
即使在膜厚度的减少已经结束后，也会进行额外的显影处理一段规定的时间，以便完全进行显影处理。为了实现良好的重复性和高效率地进行显影处理，需要准确定义额外显影处理的时期。更具体地说，如果这个时期太短，显影处理就做得不够。如果这个时期太长，就会发生过度显影，工作效率就会降低。

source: IRC is based on a client-server model . Clients are programs that connect to a server , a server is a program that transports data , ( messages ) , from a user client to another . There are clients running on many different systems , ( Unix , emacs , VMS , MSDOS , VM ... ) , that allow you to connect to an IRC server . The client which will be spoken of here is the most widespread : ircII , ( originally designed by Michael Sandrof ) . Other clients are similar , and often accept ircII commands .  1.2 How to behave on IRC
domestication: IRC是一个基于客户端-服务器的模型。客户端是连接到服务器的程序，而服务器则是一个传输数据（消息）的程序，它可以将一个用户客户端的消息传递给另一个客户端。在许多不同的系统上都有客户端在运行，比如Unix、emacs、VMS、MSDOS、VM等，这些客户端允许你连接到IRC服务器。本文中要介绍的客户端是ircII，它是最广泛使用的客户端（最初由Michael Sandrof设计）。其他客户端与ircII类似，经常也接受ircII命令。那么，我们来看看如何在IRC上表现自己。

source: Hollywood legend Michael Deane , who rises from PR guy extraordinaire to the aging producer of an odious web-cast dating program called Hookbook , rises to prominence by suggesting that the marketing of the film Cleopatra , which was hemorrhaging money , focus on the real-life Richard Burton-Elizabeth Taylor drama , rather than the movie itself . You seem to suggest that the Cleopatra PR was the starting point of today 's reality-TV-based culture . What gave you that idea ?

You seem to suggest that the Cleopatra PR was the starting point of today 's reality-TV-based culture . What gave you that idea ?
说起好莱坞传奇迈克尔·迪恩，他从一名公关专家起家，最终成为了一档叫做《鱼书》的恶心的网络约会节目的老龄化制作人。他出人头地的原因是他建议将电影《埃及艳后》的宣传重点放在现实生活中的理查德·伯顿和伊丽莎白·泰勒的戏剧性恋情上，而不是电影本身。你似乎认为《埃及艳后》的宣传是现代基于真人秀的文化的起点，你是怎么想到这一点的？

source: A little while back , I was tasked with defining the seven ages of goth . Basically , the goal was to go from the birth of the genre to its modern forms and incarnations based on the years which each of those subgenres were at their height . It was a fair bit of writing that pleased pretty much no one because goths are happiest when they 're pointing out how much more they know about goth than you , but there was always one huge , glaring omission to the article that I could n't hide : Nick Cave .
domestication: 有一阵子前，我被安排去定义哥特音乐的七个阶段。基本上，目标是从这种音乐流派的诞生到其现代形式和体现，基于每个子流派在巅峰时期的年份。这是一篇挺长的文章，但似乎谁都没有被它所取悦，因为哥特族最开心的时候，就是当他们指出自己比你更了解哥特音乐的时候。不过，有一件事一直让我觉得是明显的缺陷，就是无法回避尼克·凯夫（Nick Cave）。

source: A third project supported a right-wing weekly newspaper , which was an instrument of the anti-Allende campaign during and for a time after the 1970 election campaign . Another project funded an asset who produced regular radio political commentary shows attacking the political parties on the left and supporting CIA se1ected candidates . After the Soviet invasion of Czechoslovakia , this asset organized a march on the Soviet Embassy which led to major police action and mass media coverage . Other assets funded under this project placed CIA-inspired editorials almost daily in El Mercurio , Chile 's major newspaper and , after 1968 , exerted substantial control over the content of that paper 's international news section .
domestication: 有个项目支持一个右翼周报，这份报纸在1970年选举活动期间和之后一段时间里，是反阿连德运动的工具。另一个项目资助了一个资产，这个资产制作了定期的广播政治评论节目，攻击左翼政党，支持中情局挑选的候选人。在苏联入侵捷克斯洛伐克后，这个资产组织了一场游行，前往苏联大使馆，引发了大规模警方行动和媒体报道。在这个项目下资助的其他资产几乎每天在智利最大的报纸《埃尔·默丘里奥报》上刊登中情局启发的社论，并且在1968年之后，对该报国际新闻板块的内容施加了相当大的控制。这些项目都对智利的舆论和政治产生了不小的影响。

source: The father of one of the slain SEALs , Charles Woods , has called the White House version of what happened at Benghazi a " pack of lies . " He said in an interview , " To me -- I 'm an attorney , this may not legal test of murder -- but to me , that is not only cowardice . For those people who made the decision and who knew about the decision and lied about it are murderers of my son . "
domestication: 一个被杀死的海豹突击队员的父亲，查尔斯·伍兹，对白宫关于本加扎事件的说法毫不买账，他称之为“一派胡言”。他在接受采访时说：“在我看来——虽然这可能没有法律效力——那不仅是懦弱的表现。那些做出决定并且知道真相却编造谎言的人，都是我儿子的凶手。”

source: I swore when I bought my house 14 years ago that the first thing I was going to do was gut my pink bathroom . But back then , I did n't have $20,000 to spare , and over time , I started to bond with my oh-so-ugly " oval office ! " So I named her Flo and decked her out in falmingos , and the rest is history !
domestication: 我十四年前买房的时候发誓，第一件事就是把粉红色的浴室改造一下。但当时我没有2万美元的闲钱，时间长了，我开始喜欢上了那个丑陋的“椭圆形办公室”！于是，我给它取名叫Flo，并用火烈鸟装饰，剩下的就是历史了！我简直被自己家的这片区域迷住了，谁还需要改造呢？我觉得就这样也挺好！

source: There are a whole host of issues to address . Glass-Steagall has some very compelling and appealing characteristics . Easier said than done though especially at this point in time . Why is that ? There are only a small number of banks ( oligopoly ) and if those are further cordoned off by implementation of G-S , then the limited liquidity in the marketplace may actually decline even further .
domestication: 问题多得是，光是格拉斯-斯蒂格尔法案（Glass-Steagall）就有很多值得讨论的地方，也很有吸引力。但说起来容易做起来难，尤其是在现在这个时候。为什么这么说呢？因为现在银行业基本上就是少数几家大银行（寡头垄断）的天下，如果再实施格拉斯-斯蒂格尔法案，那么市场上的流动性可能会进一步减少。
foreignization: 有很多问题需要解决。格拉斯-斯蒂格尔法案有一些非常有说服力和吸引力的特点。然而，这要比说起来容易得多，尤其是在这个时候。为什么呢？只有一小部分银行（寡头垄断），如果那些银行进一步被格拉斯-斯蒂格尔法案隔离，那么市场上的有限流动性可能实际上会进一步下降。

messages_domestication.content:

There are only a small number of banks ( oligopoly ) and if those are further cordoned off by implementation of G-S , then the limited liquidity in the marketplace may actually decline even further .

source: Overall , Virginia boasts one of the best-educated and most productive workforces in the country . It employs a higher percentage of people in science and engineering than any other state in the nation , and has been successful both in providing higher education opportunities to its population and in attracting highly educated workers from other states . source: In a sequence of decisions in 1971 through 1973 , the 40 Committee authorized nearly $4 million for opposition political parties in Chile . Most of this money went to the Christian Democratic Party ( PDC ) , but a substantial portion was earmarked for the National Party ( PN ) , a conservative grouping more stridently opposed to the Allende government than was the PDC . An effort was also made to split the ruling Popular Unity coalition by inducing elements to break away .
domestication: 20世纪70年代初，美国政府开始对智利进行渗透和破坏。在1971年到1973年间，40委员会作出了一系列决定，授权拨款近400万美元支持智利的反对党。其中大部分钱都流向了基督教民主党，但也有相当一部分被用于支持国民党，这是一个比基督教民主党更为激烈反对阿连德政府的保守派团体。他们还试图通过拉拢部分人马脱离联盟来分裂执政的联合阵线。这些行为都是美国政府干涉智利内政的体现。

source: The Imperial Navy in Star Wars . The Empire also has " Stormtroopers " ( from German " Sturmtruppen " , a term originating with the German Army in World War One ) . And Darth Vader 's helmet vaguely resembles a Stahlhelm ( It 's also based on the samurai kabuto . The concept art made this vastly more obvious ) . The crew members on the Walkers appear to be wearing Wehrmacht uniforms down to the helmets , only with goggles added .
domestication: 在《星球大战》中，帝国的海军形象让人想到纳粹德国。帝国还有“风暴兵”（这个名字来自德语“Sturmtruppen”，源自第一次世界大战时的德国军队）。达斯·维德的头盔也隐约像钢盔（当然它也借鉴了日本武士的头盔，最初的概念设计更是很明显）。帝国的步行机操作员看起来就像穿着德国国防军的军装，连头盔都一样，只是在外面加了副护目镜。这些细节都让人不禁联想到二战时的德国军队。

source: Queen Isabella and King Ferdinand 's 1492 conquest of Granada marked the end of the Christians ' centuries-long battle to wrest control of the Iberian Peninsula from the Muslims and the acceleration of their religious purification of Spain . Based in part on her belief that Jews , Muslims , and other nonbelievers had to be converted to Christianity , the Queen sanctioned the Spanish Inquisition and , by 1499 , began a program of forced baptisms among the Muslim population . Within three years , all Muslims in Granada who had not converted to Christianity were ordered out of the city , just as the Jews had been in 1492 . These religious purification policies would have long-lasting consequences not only for non-Christians in Spain but also for the indigenous people of the Americas .
domestication: 公元1492年，伊莎贝拉女王和斐迪南国王征服格拉纳达，这标志着基督教徒长达几个世纪的夺回伊比利亚半岛的斗争结束，也加速了他们在西班牙的宗教净化运动。这其中有一部分原因是女王相信，犹太人、穆斯林和其他不信奉基督教的人必须皈依基督教，所以她允许了西班牙的宗教裁判所，并且到1499年开始在穆斯林中强制施行洗礼。在三年之内，所有没有皈依基督教的穆斯林被驱逐出了格拉纳达城，就像1492年的犹太人一样。这些宗教净化政策将对西班牙的非基督徒和美洲的土著居民产生深远的影响。
foreignization: 伊莎贝拉女王和斐迪南国王在1492年对格拉纳达的征服标志着基督徒们几个世纪长期争夺伊比利亚半岛控制权与穆斯林的斗争的结束以及他们在西班牙加速进行宗教纯化。部分基于她认为犹太人、穆斯林和其他非信徒必须皈依基督教这一信念，女王赞同了西班牙宗教裁判所，并且到了1499年，在穆斯林人口中开始了一项强制洗礼计划。在三年之内，格拉纳达所有未皈依基督教的穆斯林被命令离开这座城市，就像1492年犹太人一样。这一系列宗教纯化政策将会给西班牙的非基督徒带来长期的后果，而且也会给美洲的土著居民带来后果。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Queen Isabella and King Ferdinand 's 1492 conquest of Granada marked the end of the Christians ' centuries-long battle to wrest control of the Iberian Peninsula from the Muslims and the acceleration of their religious purification of Spain . Based in part on her belief that Jews , Muslims , and other nonbelievers had to be converted to Christianity , the Queen sanctioned the Spanish Inquisition and , by 1499 , began a program of forced baptisms among the Muslim population . Within three years , all Muslims in Granada who had not converted to Christianity were ordered out of the city , just as the Jews had been in 1492 . These religious purification policies would have long-lasting consequences not only for non-Christians in Spain but also for the indigenous people of the Americas .

source: Yet public pronouncements not withstanding , after Allende 's inauguration the 40 Committee approved a total of over seven million dollars in covert support to opposition groups in Chile . That money also funded and extensive anti-Allende propaganda campaign . Of the total authorized by the 40 Committee , over six million dollars was spent during the Allende presidency and $84,000 was expended shortly thereafter for commitments made before the coup . The total amount spent on covert action in Chile during 1970-73 was approximately $7 million , including project funds not requiring 40 Committee approval .

source: Historians examining the detailed accounts in 1 and 2 Kings have determined that Queen Jezebel 's era , around 9th century B.C. , was one of Israel 's most intense religious-political struggles . The 22-year reign of Ahab and Jezebel was marked by a religious contest between adherents of Ba'al and followers of Yahweh , and by a political battle between urban elites and rural landowners .  Jezebel Was a Daughter of Intrigue
domestication: 历史学家们对《列王记上》和《列王记下》中详细的描述进行了研究，认为耶泽벨女王那个时代，大约是在公元前9世纪，是以色列最激烈的宗教政治斗争时期。阿哈和耶泽贝尔二十二年的统治中，巴力信徒和雅威信徒之间发生了激烈的宗教冲突，同时城里的权贵和农村的地主之间也展开了一场激烈的政治斗争。耶泽贝尔是一个充满阴谋的女人，她的出现，让当时的社会更加动荡不安。她的到来，对当时的以色列社会产生了深远的影响，引发了许多人的争议和批判。
foreignization: 研究一世纪和二世纪的历史学家已经确定了耶洗别女王的那个时代，大约在公元前9世纪，是以色列最激烈的宗教-政治斗争时期之一。 亚哈和耶洗别的22年统治期间，以巴力为崇拜对象者和雅威的追随者的宗教竞争，以及城市精英和农村地主之间的政治斗争为标志。 耶洗别是一个阴谋的女儿

source: For example , one might object to comparisons of pornography and sexualized images of women in advertising because porn is consumed privately and advertising ( sometimes ) is n't . But the logical consequence could easily -- and often has easily -- become : we can not have women depicted sexually in public . To keep the argument logically consistent : in porn , we consent and so it 's okay , in advertisement , we do n't consent , so it 's not . That means banning advertisement with questionable content , back to women showing their ankles off in ads , and wearing full-length dresses otherwise .
domestication: 举个例子，有人可能会反对将色情内容和广告中女性的性感形象进行比较，因为色情内容通常是在私下观看，而广告（有时）不是。但是，这种逻辑很容易就变成了：我们不能在公共场合展示女性的性感形象。为了让论点逻辑上保持一致：在色情内容中，我们是自愿选择观看，所以没问题，但在广告中，我们没有选择，所以不行。这意味着禁止刊登含有令人质疑的内容的广告，回到女性在广告中只露出脚踝，平时穿长裙的时代。这样一来，女性的自由和权利又该怎么办呢？难道要回到封建社会，重新包裹起女性的身体吗？这种思维逻辑简直是本末倒置！
foreignization: 例如，人们可能会反对将色情内容和广告中的女性性化图像进行比较，因为色情内容是私下消费的，而广告（有时）不是。但是逻辑后果很容易——并且经常很容易——变成：我们不能在公共场合描绘女性的性。为了保持论点的逻辑一致性：在色情内容中，我们同意所以没问题，在广告中，我们不同意，所以有问题。这意味着禁止包含有问题内容的广告，回到女性在广告中只露脚踝，其他时候穿长袍。

For example , one might object to comparisons of pornography and sexualized images of women in advertising because porn is consumed privately and advertising ( sometimes ) is n't . But the logical consequence could easily -- and often has easily -- become : we can not have women depicted sexually in public . To keep the argument logically consistent : in porn , we consent and so it 's okay , in advertisement , we do n't consent , so it 's not . That means banning advertisement with questionable content , back to women showing their ankles off in ads , and wearing full-length dresses otherwise .

source: This table indicates the level-of-service ratings and crowding factors for various passenger densities . Crowding factors are multipliers relative to in-vehicle time cost values . This indicates , for example , that at 1.0 passengers per square meter , waiting time is 1.14 times in-vehicle travel time values , and walking time is 1.50 in-vehicle travel time .  Other Levels-Of-Service Indicators
domestication: 根据乘客密度的不同，这张表显示了服务水平评级和拥挤系数。拥挤系数是相对于车内时间成本值的倍数。举个例子，当每平方米有1.0名乘客时，等待时间是车内行驶时间值的1.14倍，步行时间是车内行驶时间值的1.50倍。这些指标可以让我们更好地了解交通工具在不同乘客密度下的舒适度和效率。
foreignization: 此表指出不同乘客密度的服务等级评分和拥挤因子。 拥挤因子是相对于车辆内时间成本值的乘数。 这表明，例如，在每平方米1.0名乘客的情况下，等待时间是行车时间值的1.14倍，而步行时间是行车时间值的1.50倍。 其他服务等级指标

source: Wales is right about one thing , though . This fact does have enormous policy implications . If Wikipedia is written by occasional contributors , then growing it requires making it easier and more rewarding to contribute occasionally . Instead of trying to squeeze more work out of those who spend their life on Wikipedia , we need to broaden the base of those who contribute just a little bit .
domestication: 虽然说得有道理，但威尔士的话还有一点值得肯定，这确实对政策产生了深远影响。如果维基百科是由偶尔贡献内容的用户编写的，那么为了让它发展壮大，就需要让人们更容易和更愿意偶尔贡献。我们不应试图从那些把生命都奉献给维基百科的人身上榨取更多的劳动，而是应该拓宽参与的基础，让更多人能够贡献出一点力。
foreignization: 威尔士在一件事上是正确的。这个事实确实具有巨大的政策含义。如果维基百科是由偶尔贡献者撰写的，那么发展它就需要使其更容易和有价值地偶尔贡献。我们不应试图从那些把他们生命花在维基百科上的人身上榨取更多工作，而是需要扩大那些只贡献一点点的贡献者的基础。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Wales is right about one thing , though . This fact does have enormous policy implications . If Wikipedia is written by occasional contributors , then growing it requires making it easier and more rewarding to contribute occasionally . Instead of trying to squeeze more work out of those who spend their life on Wikipedia , we need to broaden the base of those who contribute just a little bit .

source: These services also provide you with analytics so you can see who 's watching your video , when they 're watching it , and when they stop watching your video so you can better optimize your videos . Then , when you 're done with your video , you can transcribe it and place it below so all of your content is then searchable from the crawlers on the search engines .
domestication: 这些服务还会提供数据分析，让你知道谁在看你的视频、什么时候看以及他们什么时候停止观看，这样你就能更好地优化视频。接着，当你完成视频制作后，可以对其进行转录，并将文字内容放在下方，这样所有的内容都能被搜索引擎的爬虫收录，变得可搜索。这样不仅能增加视频的曝光率，还能让用户更容易找到相关内容。

source: Generally speaking , the exceptions to discharge apply automatically if the language prescribed by section 523(a) applies . The most common types of nondischargeable debts are certain types of tax claims , debts not set forth by the debtor on the lists and schedules the debtor must file with the court , debts for spousal or child support or alimony , debts for willful and malicious injuries to person or property , debts to governmental units for fines and penalties , debts for most government funded or guaranteed educational loans or benefit overpayments , debts for personal injury caused by the debtor 's operation of a motor vehicle while intoxicated , debts owed to certain tax-advantaged retirement plans , and debts for certain condominium or cooperative housing fees .

source: A : As an academically employed researcher , the hours are highly variable . Research science is more of a lifestyle than a job . Researchers have certain goals that they would like to reach by certain dates , but most do not have specific hours which they must work . Some work from 9 to 5 . Most spend a few late nights or weekend days in the lab each week . The scientists I know work about 40-50 hours . Of course , the hours are longer when one is just starting out ( e.g. graduate school ) .  Q : How many years in college are needed to become a Marine Biologist ?
domestication: 作为一名科研工作者，我每天的工作时间都不太一样。这份工作更像是一种生活方式，而不是单纯的工作。我们有目标想要在特定的日期之前完成，但并没有固定的工作时间。有些人每天从早上9点工作到下午5点，有些人则经常加班到深夜或者周末还要去实验室。我的同事们大概每周工作40到50个小时。但当然，如果你是新手，就像刚刚进研究生院的时候，工作时间可能会更长。至于你问怎么样才能成为一名海洋生物学家？实际上，需要在大学里学习很多年。
foreignization: A：作为一名受雇的学术研究人员，工作时间非常不规律。科学研究更像是生活方式，而不是工作。研究人员有他们希望在某些日期之前达到的某些目标，但大多数人没有特定的工作时间。有些人从9点到5点工作。大多数人每周都会在实验室里度过几个深夜或周末。 我认识的科学家工作时间约为40-50小时。 当然，当一个人刚刚起步时（例如，研究生），工作时间会更长。 Q：要成为一名海洋生物学家，需要读大学多少年？

source: To call the President a muslin is a very big deal , especially since he refrains from publicly discussing his fabric preferences . What does this mean ? Are you a muslin scholar ? Can you tell us about other presidents or elected officials who might also be muslin or -- GOD FORBID -- surely the gayest of fabrics ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ?
