source: All that being said , typography does have its uses , which should not be ignored when creating an infographic . Most of the time , you will want to focus your creative typographical energies on titles and headings . The title of the infographic is a perfect opportunity to use a fun and eye-catching font and to give it a treatment that fits the theme or topic . Just make sure the title is n't so distracting that it takes away from the reason we are looking at the infographic in the first place . The truth of the matter is that some infographic topics are boring , but the right title design can engage people enough to scroll through .
domestication: 话虽如此，排版还是有一些妙用，做信息图的时候不能忽略。一般来说，你会想把创意的排版精力集中在标题和标题上。信息图的标题是用一个有趣且吸引眼球的字体的绝佳机会，并赋予它一个符合主题或话题的设计。只要确保标题没有过于分散注意力，以至于让人忘了最初看信息图的原因。事实是，有些信息图的主题很枯燥，但合适的标题设计可以让人足够感兴趣而继续往下看。
foreignization: 话虽如此，排版确实有它的用途，在创建信息图表时不应该忽略这些用途。大多数时候，你将希望专注于标题和标题的创意排版能量。信息图表的标题是使用一个有趣且吸引眼球的字体并为其提供与主题或主题相符的处理的绝佳机会。只要确保标题不要太分散注意力，以至于让我们最初浏览信息图表的原因黯然失色。事实是，一些信息图表主题很枯燥，但正确的标题设计可以让人们足够感兴趣而滚动浏览。

The truth of the matter is that some infographic topics are boring , but the right title design can engage people enough to scroll through .
话虽如此，排版确实有它的用途，在创建信息图表时不应该忽略这些用途。大多数时候，你将希望专注于标题和标题的创意排版能量。信息图表的标题是使用一个有趣且吸引眼球的字体并为其提供与主题或主题相符的处理的绝佳机会。只要确保标题不要太分散注意力，以至于让我们最初浏览信息图表的原因黯然失色。事实是，一些信息图表主题很枯燥，但正确的标题设计可以让人们足够感兴趣而滚动浏览。

source: US aircraft and artillery bombarded Fallujah yesterday in one of the heaviest assaults of the Iraqi town since the US siege three weeks ago . source: Some track more closely than others . ETFs following large , widely followed indexes such as the S &P; 500 should be really close to the underlying benchmark . If they do n't track an index closely -- more than 0.10 percent variation is a warning sign -- that means you 're veering further away from the total return on your chosen basket of securities .
domestication: 有些跟踪的更准确些，而有些就差一点儿。跟踪那些大盘指数（比如标普500）的ETF应该跟底层指数走势非常接近。如果跟踪的不够准确——也就是说，如果跟底层指数有超过0.1%的偏差——那就意味着你离所选择的投资组合的整体收益就越来越远了。一般来说，如果出现这种情况的话，那就要引起注意了，可能就得重新考虑你的投资策略了。
foreignization: 有些跟踪的更为接近，而有些则没有。 跟踪大型、广泛被关注的指数（如标准普尔500指数）的ETF应该与其基准指数非常接近。如果它们不能够紧密跟踪某个指数 —— 超过0.10百分比的变异是一个警告信号 ——这意味着你正在远离所选证券篮子的总回报。

source: Because Romney had run on not cutting taxes , he attempted to close the budget deficit by severe cuts and raising fees . When local gov had to raise property taxes to make up for cut in funding , and residents complained , Romney signed into law legislation that allowed communities to shift the burden of property taxes from residential property owners to businesses .
domestication: 罗姆尼竞选时曾承诺不减税，但上台后却通过大幅削减开支和提高费用来尝试平衡预算。当地政府不得不提高财产税来弥补减少的资金，而居民们又抱怨不断增加的税费，这时罗姆尼签署了一项法律，允许社区将财产税的负担从住宅业主转移到企业身上。这样一来，居民们的税费负担得以减轻，但企业可能会面临更大的压力。
foreignization: 由于罗姆尼竞选时承诺不减税，他试图通过严厉削减开支和提高费用来平衡预算。当地方政府不得不提高财产税来弥补资金削减，居民抱怨时，罗姆尼签署了允许社区将财产税负担从住宅业主转嫁给企业的立法。

Because Romney had run on not cutting taxes , he attempted to close the budget deficit by severe cuts and raising fees . source: Many women I work with have a love-hate relationship with Power . They want to be powerful , but the definition of power in their heads leaves a bad taste in their mouths . For many women , power conjures up pictures of a dictatorial , hierarchic , dominating , aggressive , " my way or the highway " person . So , without even realizing this , many women give away their power .
domestication: 我身边有很多女性朋友都对权力这件事抱有矛盾的态度，她们一方面想要拥有权力，但另一方面，又觉得传统意义上的权力观念让她们感到不舒服。在很多女性眼中，权力似乎总是与专制、等级森严、支配和攻击性联系在一起，好像非要把自己的想法强加给别人，否则就不考虑别人的感受。因此，许多女性在不知不觉中放弃了自己的力量。
foreignization: 我合作的许多女性与权力有着爱恨交织的关系。她们希望自己拥有力量，但她们脑海中的权力定义让她们感到不舒服。对于许多女性来说，权力唤起的是独裁、等级、支配和咄咄逼人的“非此即彼”的人。因此，许多女性在毫无察觉的情况下放弃了自己的权力。

source: Louis worried his bottom lip between his teeth ; his eyes were glazed over and he unconsciously rubbed the nape of Harry 's neck . Turning , he cast his attention onto the tray the younger boy had brought , and quickly speared a bit of pancake onto his fork , and popped the bite into his mouth , " Was it ? Was it better than -- God , Hazza , these are delicious . "
domestication: 路易斯的牙齿咬住了下唇，眼睛变得呆滞无神，他下意识地揉捏着哈利的后颈。转头一看，他的注意力转移到了年幼男孩带来的托盘上，迅速用叉子挑起一块煎饼，塞进嘴里，“好吃吗？比……哦，天哪，哈扎，这些简直太美味了。”
foreignization: 路易斯把他的下嘴唇塞在牙齿之间；他的眼睛蒙上了一层雾， 他无意识地揉搓着哈利的后颈部。转过身，他把注意力投向年轻的男孩带来的托盘，迅速将一块煎饼叉到他的叉子上，然后把这口放进嘴里， “ 是吗？是不是比——天啊，哈扎，这些真是太好吃了。”

messages_domestication.content:

Turning , he cast his attention onto the tray the younger boy had brought , and quickly speared a bit of pancake onto his fork , and popped the bite into his mouth , " Was it ? Was it better than -- God , Hazza , these are delicious . "
路易斯的牙齿咬住了下唇，眼睛变得呆滞无神，他下意识地揉捏着哈利的后颈。转头一看，他的注意力转移到了年幼男孩带来的托盘上，迅速用叉子挑起一块煎饼，塞进嘴里，“好吃吗？比……哦，天哪，哈扎，这些简直太美味了。”

Louis worried his bottom lip between his teeth ; his eyes were glazed over and he unconsciously rubbed the nape of Harry 's neck . Turning , he cast his attention onto the tray the younger boy had brought , and quickly speared a bit of pancake onto his fork , and popped the bite into his mouth , " Was it ? Was it better than -- God , Hazza , these are delicious . "
路易斯把他的下嘴唇塞在牙齿之间；他的眼睛蒙上了一层雾， 他无意识地揉搓着哈利的后颈部。转过身，他把注意力投向年轻的男孩带来的托盘，迅速将一块煎饼叉到他的叉子上，然后把这口放进嘴里， “ 是吗？是不是比——天啊，哈扎，这些真是太好吃了。”

source: #7 , though very crudely put , is actually warning of an important confusion . When an American compliments someone , it 's meant sincerely , but does n't go further than what is said . If I say you play the tuba well , I really do mean that I like your tuba playing . However , I am not trying to flatter you , suck up to you , or get in your pants by saying so ; I 'm just trying to find a single point of connection between us . This is obvious to Americans but not to others , who tend to only use compliments in the three situations I mentioned .
domestication: 第七点虽然说得很粗糙，但实际上是在警告一种重要的混淆。当美国人夸赞某个人时，是真心的，但仅限于说出来的话。如果我说你吹大号吹得好，我确实是这个意思，我真的喜欢你的演奏。但是我并不是想拍你的马屁，讨好你，或是想怎么样，只是想找一个我们之间的共同点。这对美国人来说很明显，但对其他人来说就不一样了，他们只会在三个特定情况下给予夸赞：拍马屁、讨好或是想讨人欢心。
foreignization: #7 虽然说得很粗糙，但实际上是在警告一个重要的混淆。当一个美国人赞美某个人时，是真诚的，但不会超过言语所表达的意思。如果我说你演奏大号演奏得好，我确实是这个意思，我真的喜欢你的大号演奏。然而，我不是试图拍你的马屁，讨好你，或通过这样说来得到你的青睐；我只是试图在我们之间找到一个联系点。这对于美国人来说是显而易见的，但对于其他人来说并非如此，他们倾向于只在我提到的三个情况下使用赞美。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

#7 , though very crudely put , is actually warning of an important confusion . When an American compliments someone , it 's meant sincerely , but does n't go further than what is said . If I say you play the tuba well , I really do mean that I like your tuba playing . However , I am not trying to flatter you , suck up to you , or get in your pants by saying so ; I 'm just trying to find a single point of connection between us . This is obvious to Americans but not to others , who tend to only use compliments in the three situations I mentioned .

source: Today , I tell my clients that I 'm a Product Experience Designer. nBut what we do is closely related to many other words. nClients find this confusing . This schizophrenia does not instil confidence in what we do. nA pretty poor start for the guardians of simplicity. nBut even if titles are come and go , we 've got beautifully visualised process diagram to wow clients and explain what we do , right ? nnn
domestication: 今天，我告诉客户我是一名产品体验设计师。但我们的工作与很多其他词密切相关，这让客户感到困惑。这种混乱的定位并不能让客户对我们的工作充满信心。这对简单的守护者来说是个糟糕的开始。即使职称随时可能更改，我们也有漂亮的视觉化流程图来给客户留下深刻印象，并解释我们做什么，对吧？

source: Harry straightened up and straddled the elder 's lap ; completely mistaking the hitch in the latter 's breath as anticipation . Snaking his arms around Louis ' neck , he pressed his hands into the collar of Louis ' shirt , and allowed his fingertips to skim over the gold-tinged skin that stretched tight over layers of pure muscle and sinew . Diving in , he ghosted his mouth over Louis ' cheekbones ; his jaw line ; before pressing his lips gently onto the one spot on the older boy 's neck where the flesh lay thinnest : where the quickening of Louis ' pulse was most palpable .
domestication: 哈利一下子直起身来，跨坐在老大腿上，完全误以为对方呼吸中的断顿是期待的表现。 他环着路易斯的脖子，把手伸进他的衬衫领口，让指尖轻轻扫过紧绷的金色皮肤和下面结实的肌肉。 他凑近，嘴唇在路易斯的颧骨、下巴线条上轻轻扫过，然后把嘴唇轻轻按在路易斯脖子上最薄的那一块皮肤上，在那里可以感觉到他心跳的加快。 哈利的动作很温柔，却又充满了挑逗，仿佛在引诱路易斯做出反应。

source: " In Brett J. Talley 's That Which Should Not Be I have to admit I think I 've found one of the best homages to Lovecraft I have read . I 'd go so far as to use the almost cheesy line that it 's " a Love letter to the work of Lovecraft " . Anybody with any interest in Lovecraft 's work will recognise the style of writing and the on-going themes that Talley has pulled into the book . " - Paul Metcalf , PisssedOffGeek.com

source: Every good strategy , he writes , includes what he calls the kernel : a " diagnosis " of the challenge ( " What 's going on here ? " ) , a " guiding policy " for dealing with that challenge ( the core idea often called a strategy ) , and a set of " coherent actions " to carry out that policy ( the implementation ) .
domestication: 他认为，每个良好的策略都包含一个核心，也就是说，要对挑战进行“诊断”（到底发生了什么？），然后制定出解决挑战的“指导方针”（也就是人们常说的战略核心思想），最后是有一套“连贯的行动”来实施这个方针（也就是实施阶段）。总之，他强调策略需要完整的逻辑链条，而不仅仅是一个想法。
foreignization: 每一个好的策略，他写道，都包括他所说的核心：一个对挑战的“诊断”（“这里发生了什么？”），一个处理这个挑战的“指导方针”（通常被称为策略的核心思想），以及一系列“连贯的行动”来执行该方针（实施）。

source: As a parent , I know she is right - most of us do n't have degrees in child development nor do we spend hours poring over literature and research that helps us understand what really is best for our kids . domestication: 做父母的，我知道她说得对，大多数人没有学过儿童发展学，也不会花几个小时阅读文献和研究来了解什么才是对孩子真正有益的。不幸的是，我们得到的大部分信息来自开发出“帮助家长”产品的公司。这种情况就像盲人摸象一样，缺乏系统的知识和真实的研究数据，我们很容易被误导。我们需要睁大眼睛，认真甄别信息的来源，避免被商业利益所左右，才能真正做到以孩子为中心。

As a parent , I know she is right - most of us do n't have degrees in child development nor do we spend hours poring over literature and research that helps us understand what really is best for our kids . Unfortunately , much of the information we get comes from companies that have developed products to " help parents . "
做父母的，我知道她说得对，大多数人没有学过儿童发展学，也不会花几个小时阅读文献和研究来了解什么才是对孩子真正有益的。不幸的是，我们得到的大部分信息来自开发出“帮助家长”产品的公司。这种情况就像盲人摸象一样，缺乏系统的知识和真实的研究数据，我们很容易被误导。我们需要睁大眼睛，认真甄别信息的来源，避免被商业利益所左右，才能真正做到以孩子为中心。

source: 9 , Well , what about daytrading ? A lot of people seem to do that successfully . Please see my article " 8 Reasons Not to Daytrade " . I got a lot of criticism after that . People wanted to show me their tax returns to show me how good they daytraded . Get lost , punks . Some people make millions playing the violin also . Does n't mean the other six billion people on the planet should perform in Carnegie Hall . In any case , we 're talking about investing in stocks . Not scalping like a little kid with eight terminals in front of him . And guess what , even the best daytraders in the world with twenty year track records go broke sometimes .
domestication: 那什么是短线交易呢？很多人似乎很成功地做着这件事。去看看我的文章《八个不日内盘的理由》吧。我发表那篇文章后受到了一些批评，人们想向我出示他们的税单来证明自己的日内盘交易有多成功。滚开吧，小子。有些人也能通过拉小提琴赚到数百万，不代表全世界六十亿人口都应该在卡内基音乐厅表演。无论如何，我们讨论的是股票投资，而不是像小孩一样在电脑前疯狂做单。更别说，即使是世界上最好的日内交易者，有着二十年成功记录，也有破产的时候。
foreignization: 9, 好吧, 那么日内交易怎么样? 很多人似乎都能成功地做到这一点. 请看我的文章"8 个理由不进行日内交易". 在那之后我受到了很多批评. 人们想给我看他们的税单来向我展示他们如何进行日内交易. 滚开, 小子们. 有些人演小提琴也能赚几百万. 不意味着地球上其他六十亿人应该在卡内基音乐厅表演. 无论如何, 我们正在讨论股票投资. 不是像小孩一样在他面前摆八个终端进行削头皮买卖. 并且, 即使是世界上最好的日内交易者, 具有二十年记录的交易者, 有时也会破产.

source: The big danger in the US remains that the government will fail to attack the debt problem , leaving a Japanese-style anchor on the recovery . Just as it makes no sense to analyze emerging markets in terms of generic rubrics like BRICs , developed markets also need to be analyzed as individual stories . The dramatically different approaches of the developed nations to the basic challenges -- de-leveraging and maintaining strength in manufacturing -- is going to put them on very different growth paths . And if you compare the United States to its rich peers , it has the best chance to be a Breakout Nation , particularly if Washington can get its game together and attack the public debt .
domestication: 美国最大的危险在于政府可能无法有效解决债务问题，从而使经济复苏遭到日本式的拖累。就像不能简单地根据诸如“金砖四国”之类的模式来分析新兴市场一样，发达国家也需要被作为个体故事来分析。发达国家在应对基本挑战（如减债和保持制造业优势）方面采取了大不相同的方法，这将使它们走上截然不同的增长道路。如果你将美国与其富裕同行相比，它有很好的机会成为一个“崛起国家”，特别是如果华盛顿能够团结一致，集中力量解决公共债务问题的话。
foreignization: 美国仍然存在的一个巨大危险是政府可能无法解决债务问题，从而让日本式的拖累影响经济复苏。就像不能用诸如BRICs这样通用的标签来分析新兴市场一样，发达国家也需要被当作各自独立的个案来分析。发达国家在应对基本挑战（例如去杠杆和保持制造业实力）时采取了截然不同的方法，这将使它们走上不同的增长路径。如果你将美国与其富裕的同行进行比较，它有最好的机会成为一只“破局国家”（Breakout Nation），特别是如果华盛顿能够集中精力并解决公共债务问题。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The big danger in the US remains that the government will fail to attack the debt problem , leaving a Japanese-style anchor on the recovery . Just as it makes no sense to analyze emerging markets in terms of generic rubrics like BRICs , developed markets also need to be analyzed as individual stories . The dramatically different approaches of the developed nations to the basic challenges -- de-leveraging and maintaining strength in manufacturing -- is going to put them on very different growth paths . And if you compare the United States to its rich peers , it has the best chance to be a Breakout Nation , particularly if Washington can get its game together and attack the public debt .

source: Implications : Biking is seen as an easy , inexpensive solution to a large number of interrelated problems . As the world continues urbanizing , people 's health will increasingly suffer from environmental pollution and from sedentary lifestyles that do not allow for enough physical activity . Meanwhile , resource depletion will accelerate . Local transportation systems that encourage biking and walking could be a powerful antidote to these harmful trends .
domestication: 其影响是：骑自行车被视为解决一系列相关问题的简便且廉价的方法。随着世界继续城市化，人们的健康将日益受到环境污染和久坐不动的生活方式的影响，这种生活方式不能提供足够的身体活动。与此同时，资源耗尽将加速。鼓励骑行和步行的当地交通系统可以成为对抗这些有害趋势的强大解药。
foreignization: 影响： 骑自行车被视为解决一大批相关问题的简单且廉价的解决方案。 当世界继续城市化时，人们的健康将越来越受到环境污染和久坐不动的生活方式的影响，这种生活方式不能让人得到足够的身体活动。 与此同时，资源枯竭将会加速。 鼓励骑行和步行的当地交通系统可以成为对抗这些有害趋势的强效解药。

source: As well as having precisely measurable results , we have a lot of them . Instead of doing a small number of large deals like a traditional venture capital fund , we do a large number of small ones . We currently fund about 40 companies a year , selected from about 900 applications representing a total of about 2000 people . 1
domestication: 说到结果，我们不仅可以精确衡量，而且成果颇丰。我们并不像传统的风险投资基金那样只做少数几笔大生意，而是做大量的小生意。我们每年资助大约40家公司，这些公司都是从900份申请中遴选出来的，代表了大约2000人的创业热情。这样一来，成功与否一目了然，大家都能看到真实的成果。
foreignization: 除了能精确测量结果外，我们还有很多这样的结果。与传统的风险投资基金不同，他们通常会进行少量的大额交易，我们却进行大量的小额投资。我们目前每年资助大约40家公司，这些公司是从代表大约2000人的900个申请中精选出来的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As well as having precisely measurable results , we have a lot of them . Instead of doing a small number of large deals like a traditional venture capital fund , we do a large number of small ones . We currently fund about 40 companies a year , selected from about 900 applications representing a total of about 2000 people . 1
说到结果，我们不仅可以精确衡量，而且成果颇丰。我们并不像传统的风险投资基金那样只做少数几笔大生意，而是做大量的小生意。我们每年资助大约40家公司，这些公司都是从900份申请中遴选出来的，代表了大约2000人的创业热情。这样一来，成功与否一目了然，大家都能看到真实的成果。

除了能精确测量结果外，我们还有很多这样的结果。与传统的风险投资基金不同，他们通常会进行少量的大额交易，我们却进行大量的小额投资。我们目前每年资助大约40家公司，这些公司是从代表大约2000人的900个申请中精选出来的。

source: While I disagree with what you said about Zen originating in China , I agree with your points about . 1 . Training period on sushi-10 years vs. 6 months-very important . 2 . Japanese do n't have exclusive abitlity to become sushi chefs ; anyone can become one . 3 . Japanese have an advantage . 4 . HOWEVER : It 's not just training-but it 's a cultural heritage that makes a big component of hte difference . That heritage can be learned , or at least appreciated . SO training CAN work , but not necessarily .
domestication: 虽然我不同意禅宗起源于中国的说法，但我同意你关于以下几点的看法：首先，寿司师傅的培训期非常重要，日本的寿司师傅需要训练十年，而不是短短六个月。这说明了耐心和细心的重要性。其次，做寿司师傅并不是日本人的专利，任何人都可以通过努力成为一名优秀的寿司师傅。第三，日本人在寿司制作方面确实有着天然的优势，毕竟他们有着深厚的文化底蕴。然而，值得注意的是，成为一名真正的寿司大师不仅仅是简单的技术培训，更是一种文化传承。这种文化可以被学习和欣赏，所以，虽然培训很重要，但也不能保证成功。总之，要想成为一名真正的寿司大师，需要付出更多的努力和对这门艺术的深入理解。
foreignization: 虽然我不同意禅宗起源于中国的说法，但我同意你的观点：1.寿司培训期-十年vs六个月-非常重要。2.日本人并不拥有独有的成为寿司厨师的能力；任何人都可以成为一名寿司厨师。3.日本人有优势。4.然而：这不仅仅是培训，而是一种文化遗产，这构成了区别的重要组成部分。这种遗产可以被学习，或者至少被欣赏。所以，培训可以有效，但不一定有效。

SO training CAN work , but not necessarily .

source: Okay idiot leftists ... Here 's a news flash for you . Every single campaign rally holds at least one gate -- and usually it 's all the gates -- until the candidate and his/her staff leaves the area . It 's a safety measure that is set up -- not by campaign staffers -- but the secret service . This story is a load of bs. from top to bottom . Temperatures were nowhere near freezing .
domestication: 那些左派笨蛋……给你们一个新闻快讯：每次竞选集会都会在候选人和工作人员离开前封锁至少一个入口，通常是所有入口，这是一项安全措施，而不是由竞选工作人员设置的，而是由秘密服务机构实施的。这则故事从头到尾都是胡说八道。温度根本没低到冰点。
foreignization: 好了，笨蛋左派们……这里有个新闻快讯给你们。每一个竞选集会都至少有一道门——通常是所有门——直到候选人和他的/她的工作人员离开该区域。这是一个安全措施，它的设置不是由竞选工作人员——而是秘密服务机构。这个故事从上到下完全是胡说八道。温度根本没有接近冰点。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Okay idiot leftists ... Here 's a news flash for you . Every single campaign rally holds at least one gate -- and usually it 's all the gates -- until the candidate and his/her staff leaves the area . It 's a safety measure that is set up -- not by campaign staffers -- but the secret service . This story is a load of bs. from top to bottom . Temperatures were nowhere near freezing .

source: For four years the Obama campaign had been working on their Ohio firewall and it was becoming clear it was going to hold . domestication: 奥巴马竞选团队花了四年时间筑起的“俄亥俄防线”终于开始见效了。即使在第一次辩论后，各地的民调都显示选情趋于胶着，但是在俄亥俄州，罗姆尼就是无法取得突破。俄亥俄州的情况也变得愈发胶着，但是奥巴马始终保持着领先优势。可以说，“俄亥俄防线”真正成为奥巴马成功连任的一道坚固防线。

source: I 'm afraid that lingering want will always exist . We will find ways to create scarcity ... we will find the things that are difficult to create , and we will value them more highly and feel better when we acquire them , at least for a little while . And when I say all this in the future tense , I mean that it 's already happened .
domestication: 恐怕，匮乏总会存在，我们总能找到办法制造稀缺，我们会寻找那些难以创造的东西，并且会更看重它们，当我们得到它们时，我们会感到更满足，至少在一段时间里。而当我说所有这些事情都是将来时，我是指这一切已经发生了。或者说，人类天生好逸恶劳，又有七情六欲，想要的东西总是会多一些，所以我们才会觉得生活充满了艰辛，永远都有所不足。
foreignization: 我担心挥之不去的欲望将一直存在。我们会找到制造稀缺的手段……我们会找到那些难以创造的东西，并且我们会更高地评价它们并在获得它们时感觉更好，至少有一段时间。而当我用将来时态说这些话时，我的意思是这一切已经发生了。

source: Stonking debut novel that starts at full pelt and never really slows down . I wanted to read this book as it is a time in history I studied so I was intrigued to see how well it would be portrayed . James Wilde brings the hardship , horror and violence of the time to life with bloody realism . It 's a grim time where life is easily and torturously forfeit . Hereward is possibly one of England 's forgotten heroes and this interpretation of his troubled life is well worth the read .
domestication: 这本小说的开头就像一匹脱缰的野马，之后一直保持着强劲的势头，从不减速。我一直想读这本书，因为它讲述的是我学习过的历史时期，我很好奇作者如何将其描述。詹姆斯·威尔德用生动的笔法将那个时代的艰辛、恐怖和暴力栩栩如生地展现出来，这是一个残酷的时代，生命可以轻易且痛苦地消逝。赫雷沃德可能是英格兰被遗忘的英雄之一，而这本书对他坎坷一生的解读绝对值得一读。

Stonking debut novel that starts at full pelt and never really slows down . I wanted to read this book as it is a time in history I studied so I was intrigued to see how well it would be portrayed . James Wilde brings the hardship , horror and violence of the time to life with bloody realism . It 's a grim time where life is easily and torturously forfeit . Hereward is possibly one of England 's forgotten heroes and this interpretation of his troubled life is well worth the read .
这是一部非常出色的处女作，从开始到结束都充满了激情。我想读这本书是因为它讲述了我曾经研究过的历史时期，我很好奇看看作者如何将其呈现出来。詹姆斯·威尔德以血腥的现实主义将那个时代的艰难、恐怖和暴力展现出来。这是一个生活轻易且痛苦地逝去的年代。赫勒沃德可能是英格兰被遗忘的英雄之一，这本关于他动荡生活的解读绝对值得一读。

source: The 2012 CLAS standards broaden the definition of culture and health , said C. Godfrey Jacobs , a program manager with SRA International and a member of the HHS CLAS standards committee in his keynote address . The standards aim to eliminate disparities by building rapport , developing trust , personalizing care and increasing patient satisfaction . " CLAS ought to be a way of doing business , " he said .
domestication: 2012 年的 CLAS 标准扩大了文化和健康的定义，SRA 国际公司的项目经理、美国卫生与公众服务部 CLAS 标准委员会成员 C. Godfrey Jacobs 在主题演讲中表示，这些标准旨在通过建立融洽关系、发展信任、个性化护理和提高患者满意度来消除差异。他说：“CLAS 应该成为一种做事的方式。” 这就意味着，要真正做到有 Patients 的满意度，就必须让 Patients 感受到医护人员的真诚与关怀，而这正是 CLAS 所倡导的。

source: 2 Actually , someone did , once . Mitch Kapor 's wife Freada was in charge of HR at Lotus in the early years . ( As he is at pains to point out , they did not become romantically involved till afterward . ) At one point they worried Lotus was losing its startup edge and turning into a big company . So as an experiment she sent their recruiters the resumes of the first 40 employees , with identifying details changed . These were the people who had made Lotus into the star it was . Not one got an interview .
domestication: 说真的，有人当年就做过这么个实验。Mitch Kapor 的太太Freada 最早是Lotus 公司的人事部负责人（他特别提到，他们的恋爱是在那之后才开始的）。有一次，他们担心Lotus 正在失去创业初期的活力，变得像其他大公司一样。于是，Freada 作为实验，将Lotus 最早的40 名员工的简历修改了一下，让招聘人员看看。这些人就是把Lotus 建立成今天这样的一批骨干。结果，没有一个人被安排面试。

source: This same line of thinking manifested itself when contrast ratio became a spec for Plasma and LCD displays ( OMG ONE ZILLION TO ONE CONTRAST RATIO ) -- ca n't see it , does n't matter -- and is now resurfacing as companies enter the pixel density arms race . Increases in pixel density are going from impressive technical feats to masturbatory experiments for the sake of marketing strategy .
domestication: 这种想法在等离子和液晶显示器的对比度成为一个重要参数时就已经表现出来了，什么“一百万比一的对比度”，说实话，看不出来有什么区别。但是现在，这种想法又回来了，各公司开始了像素密度方面的军备竞赛。像素密度的提高，从令人印象深刻的技术成就变成了为了炫耀而进行的没完没了的尝试，只是为了市场策略而已。
foreignization: 这种思考方式在等比率成为等离子和液晶显示器的规格时表现出来（天啊，一比一百万的对比度）--看不到，没关系--并且现在当公司进入像素密度竞争时又重新出现。像素密度的增加从令人印象深刻的技术壮举转变为为了销售策略而进行的自慰实验。

source: This would be a splendid acquisition for small children , for teens deep into social networking , for an adult wanting to drop into the love seat for a quick look at what is happening in the world , for a senior citizen who wants a simple , inviting system with few hassles , to stay in touch with grandchildren . The iPad is not a light laptop ; it is instead a different way to use computing to do a wide variety of consumption and communication--not principally production .

source: Ghetto revolts also occurred beginning in 1942 . The Nazis began to destroy the established ghettos , and many underground groups organized the burning of buildings and mass attempts at escaping the Nazis . Some Jews who were able to flee joined the partisans in Russia . The partisans were a non-Jewish organization that vehemently opposed Nazi rule . Approximately 10,000-20,000 Jews joined the movement .

source: Workforce quality is closely tied to labor productivity , making it a key determinant of economic growth and wages . In today 's dynamic economy , jobs increasingly require education beyond a high school diploma . Education not only prepares individuals for the tasks required by a job , but also enhances an individual 's ability to adapt to new working environments .
domestication: 劳动力质量和劳动生产率密切相关，这使得它成为经济增长和工资的关键决定因素。在如今快速发展的经济中，工作越来越需要超过高中毕业证书的教育水平。接受教育不仅能让个人具备应对工作要求的能力，还能增强他们适应新工作环境的能力。总之，受过良好教育是事半功倍的，能让人立于不败之地。

source: At one point in the film , two missionaries knock on the door of Eva 's small , run-down house and ask her if she knows where she 's spending the afterlife . " Oh , yes I do as a matter of fact , " she responds cheerfully . " I 'm going straight to hell . source: " When I left my employer in Massachusetts in February of 1999 to accept the Olympic assignment , " Romney testified before the state Ballot Law Commission on June 17 , 2002 , " I left on the basis of a leave of absence , indicating that I , by virtue of that title , would return at the end of the Olympics to my employment at Bain Capital , but subsequently decided not to do so and entered into a departure agreement with my former partners . source: Cross shows O'Brien the photo of Martha playing volleyball . The image is the exact same one that he burned after Lavender 's death ( see " The Things They Carried " ) . O'Brien is surprised to see it , so Cross explains how he came to have another copy . He had run into Martha after the war . She had never married , had trained as a nurse , and gone on Lutheran missions to the Third World . She was unreceptive when Cross confessed that he had always loved her . When the conversation took a slightly sexual turn , she shut her eyes and rocked back and forth , seeming very disturbed . She gave him another copy of the photo of her playing volleyball and told him " not to burn this one . "
domestication: 克罗斯给奥布莱恩看了一张玛莎打排球的照片，这张照片竟然跟他在拉文德死后烧掉的那张一模一样（见“他们所承担的东西”）。奥布莱恩很惊讶，克罗斯便解释了自己是怎么又弄到了一张相同的照片的。原来他在战争结束后曾经遇见过玛莎，此时的她仍未婚，并且接受了护士培训，之后又前往第三世界国家进行路德教传教工作。当克罗斯坦白自己一直爱着她时，她的反应却很冷淡。当谈话稍微带有性意味时，她闭上眼睛来回摇晃，似乎很烦躁。她递给克罗斯另一张自己打排球的照片，并告诉他“不要烧掉这张”。

source: Different users want different types of content . Some people may like to read . Other people want to ingest it through their eyes and ears . Instead of reading , they can watch and listen to it , and get the content in the same way that they prefer . It 's also much better on mobile . There 's a much higher retention rate of content when you 're viewing it on your mobile phone through video as opposed to reading text on the small screens .
domestication: 人各有所好，不同的人对内容的喜好也不一样。有人喜欢读，有人则更愿意通过视觉和听觉来获取信息。相比阅读，他们可以通过观看和聆听来获得自己想要的内容，这样更符合他们的习惯。尤其是在移动设备上，观看视频比在小屏幕上阅读文字更能有效地吸引人。事实上，在手机上观看视频获取内容的方式比阅读小屏幕上的文字有着明显更高的信息留存率。
foreignization: 不同用户想要的内容类型是不同的。有些人可能喜欢阅读，其他人则想通过他们的眼睛和耳朵来获取它。与其阅读，他们可以观看和聆听，并以他们喜欢的方式获取内容。在移动设备上也会更好。当你在小屏幕上通过视频浏览内容而不是阅读文字时，你在手机上获取内容的保留率会大大提高。

source: In truth , Vittrup did n't expect that children 's racial attitudes would change very much just from watching these videos . Prior research had shown that multicultural curricula in schools have far less impact than we intend them to -- largely because the implicit message " We 're all friends " is too vague for young children to understand that it refers to skin color .
domestication: 说实话，维特鲁普没想到孩子们仅仅通过看这些视频就能改变他们的种族态度。之前的研究已经表明，学校里的多元文化课程的效果往往没有我们想象中那么大，这主要是因为“我们都是朋友”这种含蓄的信息对于年幼的孩子来说太过模糊，他们根本没法理解这跟皮肤颜色有关。孩子们需要更直接、更具体的指导，才能真正明白不同种族、肤色之间的区别和联系。
foreignization: 事实上，Vittrup并没有期望孩子们仅仅通过观看这些视频就能改变他们的种族态度。之前的研究已经表明，学校的多元文化课程的影响远远小于我们的期望——主要是因为隐含的信息"We're all friends"（我们都是朋友）对于年幼的孩子来说太过模糊，以至于他们无法理解它指的是皮肤颜色。

source: Seventy-five thousand reservists in Israel have been called up for whatever Israel has planned for Gaza . It 's been bombarding it for three days and has asserted to the world that it must continue to respond to rocket attacks from Hamas because Israel can not tolerate such terrorism . Yet , when one examines the collective punishment imposed upon the people of Gaza , it is clear that there is no equivalency between the power of Hamas to terrorize Israeli civilians and the power of Israel to terrorize Palestinian civilians .
domestication: 以色列动员了7.5万名预备役军人，为针对加沙的行动做准备。过去三天里，以色列一直在轰炸加沙，并声称必须继续回应哈马斯的火箭攻击，因为以色列无法容忍这种恐怖主义。然而，当人们审视加沙人民面临的集体惩罚时，很明显哈马斯恐吓以色列平民的能力和以色列恐吓巴勒斯坦平民的能力之间存在着巨大的差异。这简直是“强龙难斗地头蛇”，以色列的行为根本谈不上什么“自卫”或“反恐”，无非是以大欺小、恃强凌弱而已。

source: In the harvest feasts of 1621 and 1622 , " all had their hungry bellies filled , " but only briefly . source: Although the design and funding came from the University of Virginia , the local community around Gita built the school . source: Christopher Nolan has n't had much to say about various interpretations of Inception since its release , but costume designer Jeffrey Kurland and actor Dileep Rao ( Yusuf ) have both weighed in on their views of the ending . Nolan in general does n't comment too directly to fan theories and canon . In fact , he 's admitted that he 's highly amused that people keep constantly asking him questions about the ending even though he has no intention of answering them .
domestication: 诺兰对《盗梦空间》的各种解读基本上不做评论，但造型设计师杰弗里·科兰和演员迪利普·拉奥（饰演尤瑟夫）却都表示了他们对电影结局的看法。总的来说，诺兰对于粉丝们的理论和电影正史不太直接置评。他甚至承认自己被那些不断询问结局问题的人逗乐了，尽管他根本无意回答。
foreignization: 克里斯托弗·诺兰自《盗梦空间》发行以来，对于这部电影的各种解读鲜有发表评论，但是制片人杰弗里·库兰德和演员迪利普·拉奥（饰演Yusuf）都曾对结局发表过自己的看法。一般来说，诺兰不会对粉丝理论和剧情进行直接评论。事实上，他承认自己非常享受人们不断询问他有关结局的问题，尽管他没有打算回答他们。

source: Time Machine is the built-in backup that works with your Mac and an external drive ( sold separately ) or Time Capsule . Connect the drive , tell Time Machine to use it , and relax . Time Machine automatically backs up your entire Mac , including system files , applications , accounts , preferences , email messages , music , photos , movies , and documents . But what makes Time Machine different from other backup applications is that it not only keeps a spare copy of every file , it remembers how your system looked on any given day -- so you can revisit your Mac as it appeared in the past . Time Machine keeps hourly backups for the past 24 hours , daily backups for the past month , and weekly backups until your backup drive is full .  Setting up Time Machine backups using an external drive
domestication: Time Machine 是苹果电脑自带的一个备份工具，可以和外接硬盘（需要单独购买）或 Time Capsule 配对使用。只要把硬盘接上，告诉 Time Machine 使用它，然后就可以放心了。Time Machine 会自动备份整个苹果电脑的内容，包括系统文件、应用程序、账户、偏好设置、邮件、音乐、照片、电影和文档等等。但是 Time Machine 和其他备份软件不同的地方在于，它不仅会保留每个文件的副本，还能记住某一天你电脑的样子——所以你可以回到过去看看当时的电脑是什么样的。Time Machine 会每小时备份一次最近 24 小时的内容，每天备份一次最近一个月的内容，每周备份一次直到备份硬盘满为止。这样一来，你就可以轻松地恢复电脑到之前的状态，真是太方便了！
foreignization: 时间机器是内置的备份功能，它可以与Mac以及外部驱动器（单独销售）或时间胶囊配合使用。连接驱动器，告诉时间机器使用它，然后放松。时间机器会自动备份整个Mac，包括系统文件、应用程序、帐户、首选项、电子邮件消息、音乐、照片、电影和文档。但是，使得时间机器与其他备份应用程序不同的原因在于，它不仅保留每个文件的副本，还记得您系统在任何特定日期的样子 - 因此，您可以访问Mac的过去版本。时间机器保留过去24小时的每小时备份，过去一个月的每日备份，以及直到备份驱动器已满的每周备份。使用外部驱动器设置时间机器备份

source: By all accounts , what you need to live a satisfied , pleasant life can be purchased relatively inexpensively nowadays . People 100 years ago would look at the lifestyle of a middle class American and their jaws would drop at the wealth . Meat for breakfast , lunch , and dinner , three hour trips from Chicago to Salt Lake , instant communication with anyone anywhere , Honda Civics , 2,000 square foot houses .
domestication: 当今社会，想要过上舒适愉快的生活并不需要花费太多钱。据说，如果让100年前的老百姓看到如今中产阶级美国人的生活，他们肯定会瞠目结舌，惊叹不已。每天三餐都能吃到肉，仅需三个小时就能从芝加哥开车到盐湖城，能与世界任何地方的人进行即时通信，开着本田思域，住在2000平方英尺的大房子里……这一切在他们看来简直就是天上掉馅饼。
foreignization: 从各方面来看，你需要过上一种满意、愉快的生活所需的一切现在都可以相对便宜地购买。100年前的人会看到一个中产阶级美国人的生活方式，并且他们会对这样的财富张大了嘴巴。早餐、午餐和晚餐都有肉吃，从芝加哥到盐湖城仅需三小时就能完成的旅行，可以与世界任何地方的任何人进行即时通信， 本田思域，2000平方英尺的房子。

When you call something " not that bad " and , again , " I 've read worse " with the same breath as noting that it made a commercial splash in publishing the likes of which all the National Book Awards Finalists together will not make in a hundred years , you have affirmed that the dichotomy between art and commerce is getting ever larger .
当你说某件事情“还不错”，然后又说“我读过更糟糕的东西”，同时也提到它在出版界引起了商业轰动效应，这种轰动效应是所有国家图书奖入围者在一百年内都无法达到的，你已经肯定了艺术和商业之间的二元对立正在变得越来越大。

source: I hope one day you experience something that helps you appreciate the value of women to God , mankind , and the church . I know reading that makes you hate me more . I know that hate . Hopefully something can transform it into love and understanding . I do n't want you to be like me . I 'm nothing to aspire to , but I hope you can be more Christlike . We need more Christlike people , and transforming you would produce someone with a really good story to tell .  Loading comments ...
domestication: 我希望有一天，你会经历某些事情，从而明白女人对上帝、人类和教会的价值。我知道你读到这些话会更加讨厌我，我也清楚那种恨意。但是，也许有些事情可以把这种恨意转化为爱和理解。我不希望你像我这样，我并不是一个值得效仿的人，但我希望你能更像耶稣。这个世界需要更多像耶稣那样的人，如果你能改变的话，你将会有一个非常精彩的故事可以讲述。
foreignization: 我希望有一天你会经历一些事情，这些事情将帮助你认识到女人对于上帝，人类和教会的价值。我知道读到这些会让你更加讨厌我，我了解那种恨。我希望有什么东西能够将它转化成爱与理解。我不想让你像我一样，我一无是处，但我希望你可以更加像基督那样。我们需要更多像基督那样的人，而改变你将会造就一个有着很好故事的人。正在加载评论...

source: " So far , every columnist that TNR has posted on the subject of what can be done about he current crisis has answered , " Nothing , let 's talk about something else . " Then we get a lot of half-baked and flat out backwards economics on the subjects that they prefer to talk about , the deficit , the excuse to do nothing , and long-term productivity , the other excuse to do nothing . "
domestication: 到目前为止，《新共和》（TNR）杂志上所有就当前危机该怎么办发表过看法的专栏作家都说：“没办法，换个话题吧。”然后，我们听到了一堆关于他们想讨论的话题——赤字、无所作为的借口，以及长期生产力、另一个无所作为的借口——的半成不熟且完全错误的经济观点。这些专栏作家似乎总是避开问题的核心，只谈那些与解决眼前危机无关的事情。
foreignization: 到目前为止，TNR网站上所有撰稿人在讨论当前危机该如何解决时的回答都是，“没有办法，让我们谈点别的。”然后，我们得到了一大堆在他们更愿意讨论的话题上半成不熟且完全错误的经济观点，这些话题包括赤字，即无所作为的借口，以及长期生产率，即另一个无所作为的借口。

"

source: The first question to Romney gave Romney a chance to unload a series of devastating blows on Obama , one after the other . Obama came out of his corner strong , but from the very beginning , his face was bruised and he was faltering . The mid-way comment about Obama 's economic failure was the point where Obama should 've turned around , and instead , he feel even further behind .
domestication: 第一个问题给了罗姆尼一个机会，让他接连不断地对奥巴马进行批评。奥巴马一开始表现强势，但从一开始，他就已经显得有些狼狈不堪。中途，罗姆尼提到了奥巴马在经济方面的失败，这本该是奥巴马转败为胜的契机，但他非但没有东山再起，反而越来越落后。
foreignization: 第一个问题给了罗姆尼一个机会，让他能够一次又一次地对奥巴马造成毁灭性的打击。奥巴马强势地出击，但是从一开始，他的脸就已经遍体鳞伤，步履蹒跚。在中间提到奥巴马经济政策失败的地方，是奥巴马本应该扭转局面的地方，但是他反而越来越落后。

source: Incidentally , Qui Tam , your interpretation of the Mayflower colonists is also more than a bit mythologized ; they were Puritans , and they were hardly searching for " religious freedom " . While they were fleeing religious persecution by the Church of England , they were perfectly willing to be equally despotic in enforcing their own religious mandates once they got to the New World ; free expression was hardly one of their goals . You of all people should probably familiarize yourself with the many inherent metaphors linked to the Salem Witch Trials ...
domestication: 顺便说一下，Qui Tam，你对清教徒移民的理解也过于神话化了。他们是清教徒，根本不是在寻找“宗教自由”。虽然他们逃离了英格兰教会的宗教迫害，但是一旦到了新大陆，他们就变得非常专制，强制执行自己的宗教规定；自由表达根本不是他们的目标。你比谁都应该了解与塞勒姆女巫审判相关的隐喻……
foreignization: 顺便说一下，Qui Tam，你对清教徒移民的解释也过于神话化；他们是清教徒，而且他们根本不是在寻找“宗教自由”。虽然他们逃离了英格兰教会的宗教迫害，但是一旦到了新大陆，他们完全愿意以同样的专制手段强制执行自己的宗教命令；言论自由绝对不是他们的目标。你作为一个人，可能应该熟悉与塞勒姆巫术审判相关的众多内在隐喻...

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Incidentally , Qui Tam , your interpretation of the Mayflower colonists is also more than a bit mythologized ; they were Puritans , and they were hardly searching for " religious freedom " . While they were fleeing religious persecution by the Church of England , they were perfectly willing to be equally despotic in enforcing their own religious mandates once they got to the New World ; free expression was hardly one of their goals . You of all people should probably familiarize yourself with the many inherent metaphors linked to the Salem Witch Trials ...
顺便说一下，Qui Tam，你对清教徒移民的理解也过于神话化了。他们是清教徒，根本不是在寻找“宗教自由”。虽然他们逃离了英格兰教会的宗教迫害，但是一旦到了新大陆，他们就变得非常专制，强制执行自己的宗教规定；自由表达根本不是他们的目标。你比谁都应该了解与塞勒姆女巫审判相关的隐喻……

source: Equipment rental rates ( 7% increase in 2012 ) and utilization rates have improved in 2012 and the trend has remained positive since 2010 and is expected to continue into 2013 . Increased rental rates contribute the United Rentals ' revenues as well as margins , especially when the company is working hard in cutting its costs .
domestication: 设备租赁价格（2012年上涨了7%）和利用率在2012年有所改善，并且自2010年以来保持着良好的趋势，预计这种情况将会延续到2013年。租赁价格的上涨不仅增加了联合租赁公司的收入，也提高了其利润率，尤其是当公司努力降低成本的时候，这种情况更加明显。从数据来看，设备租赁行业的复苏态势还是比较乐观的。
foreignization: 设备租赁费率（2012年增长了7％）和利用率在2012年有所改善，自2010年以来趋势一直是正面的，并且预计将持续到2013年。租赁费率增加有助于联合租赁公司的收入以及利润率，尤其是在公司努力削减成本的时候。

source: Most roads outside the Banjul area are still unlit and unpaved . Caution should be exercised when using taxis , particularly at night . Most taxis lack safety belts and some are not road-worthy . Livestock and pedestrians pose road hazards throughout the country , including in the greater Banjul area . Drivers and pedestrians should exercise extreme caution to prevent accidents .
domestication: 在班珠尔地区以外的大部分道路仍然没有路灯，也没有铺设柏油。使用出租车时要特别谨慎，尤其是在晚上。许多出租车都不配备安全带，一些车子还不适合上路。全境各地，包括班朱尔地区，都有牲畜和行人在道路上乱走，容易引发交通事故。司机和行人都要格外小心，以防止意外发生。
foreignization: 巴塞罗地区以外的大多数道路仍然没有路灯且未铺设。使用出租车时，特别是在夜间，应谨慎。 大多数出租车缺乏安全带，一些出租车车况不佳。牲畜和行人在整个国家的道路上都构成危险，包括在大巴塞罗地区。司机和行人应该采取极端措施以防止事故。

source: Although a specified explanation is not given , if there is no light transmitting layer under the layer to be treated as described above , the extreme value of the data of the superposed light appearing immediately before the layer to be treated is penetrated is always the minimal value . In any preceding point where an extreme value occurs , the thickness of the film to be treated is larger than that at the point of the latest minimal value . Accordingly , using the point of the latest minimal value as a reference , there is the least error compared with the cases where any other point of an extreme value is adopted as a reference point and the end point of treatment can be determined more accurately .
domestication: 虽然没有具体的解释，但是如果像上面描述的那样，没有光传输层在待处理层之下，那么在待处理层之前立即出现的叠加光的数据的极值总是最小值。在任何之前的点上发生极值的地方，待处理薄膜的厚度都比最新的最小值点的厚度更大。因此，以最新的最小值点为参考点，相比其他任何极值点作为参考点，误差最小，可以更准确地确定处理的终点。这么说吧，找准这个最小值点，就能少走很多弯路，更加准确地达到目的。
foreignization: 虽然没有给出具体的解释，如果像上面所描述的那样，在待处理层下面没有光传输层，那么在待处理层之前立即出现的叠加光的数据的极值始终是最小值。在极值出现的任意前一点，待处理薄膜的厚度大于最新最小值点的厚度。因此，以最新最小值点作为参考，与采用其他任何极值点作为参考点相比，具有最小的误差，可以更准确地确定处理的终点。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Although a specified explanation is not given , if there is no light transmitting layer under the layer to be treated as described above , the extreme value of the data of the superposed light appearing immediately before the layer to be treated is penetrated is always the minimal value . In any preceding point where an extreme value occurs , the thickness of the film to be treated is larger than that at the point of the latest minimal value . Accordingly , using the point of the latest minimal value as a reference , there is the least error compared with the cases where any other point of an extreme value is adopted as a reference point and the end point of treatment can be determined more accurately .
虽然没有具体的解释，但是如果像上面描述的那样，没有光传输层在待处理层之下，那么在待处理层之前立即出现的叠加光的数据的极值总是最小值。在任何之前的点上发生极值的地方，待处理薄膜的厚度都比最新的最小值点的厚度更大。因此，以最新的最小值点为参考点，相比其他任何极值点作为参考点，误差最小，可以更准确地确定处理的终点。这么说吧，找准这个最小值点，就能少走很多弯路，更加准确地达到目的。

In any preceding point where an extreme value occurs , the thickness of the film to be treated is larger than that at the point of the latest minimal value . Accordingly , using the point of the latest minimal value as a reference , there is the least error compared with the cases where any other point of an extreme value is adopted as a reference point and the end point of treatment can be determined more accurately .

source: The " 60 " is the aspect ratio of the tire . That means that the sidewall ( the part of the tire that extends from the car 's wheel to the edge of the tread ) is 60% of the width of the tire 's tread . In our example case , then , the sidewall measures 12.3 cm from the wheel to the tread , measured radially .

source: " We have clear rules about screen time and TV time , " Mrs. Obama says . Among those rules : No TV or computer time during the week , unless it involves homework ( for Malia , who is in eighth grade , many homework assignments require computer use ) . The girls have limited TV access on the weekends , she adds , but their weekends are pretty packed . " I try to fill up their weekends with a lot of stuff , " Mrs. Obama laughs . " It 's like , sports and games and ... oh , it 's bedtime . So sorry you did n't get your TV time in ! "
domestication: “我们有明确的屏幕时间和电视时间规则，”奥巴马夫人说。这些规则包括：周内不允许看电视或使用电脑，除非是为了做作业（对于八年级的玛丽亚来说，很多作业需要使用电脑）。周末的时候，女孩们的电视时间也受到限制，不过她们的周末通常安排得很满。奥巴马夫人笑着说：“我尽量让她们的周末充满各种活动，比如运动、游戏等……不然就是已经到睡觉时间了。所以，抱歉，你们没有时间看电视！”这就像一个无奈的笑话，奥巴马夫人开玩笑地说自己像个“虎妈”，总是给女儿安排满满当当的活动，让她们没有太多时间看电视。

" It 's like , sports and games and ... oh , it 's bedtime . So sorry you did n't get your TV time in ! "

source: Talking Points -- India 's Firstpost assesses Thursday 's meeting between Prime Minister Manmohan Singh and Pakistani President Asif Ali Zardari on the sidelines of the Non-Aligned Movement summit in Tehran . " It was remarkable as much for what was not discussed as for what was , " it wrote . Pakistan 's Dawn agrees : " It achieved little beyond Pakistan reiterating the desire for close bilateral relations and improved trade and the Indian leader saying little ... "

source: Last night 's televised address capped an unprecedented day at the White House as Clinton became the first president to testify in a grand jury criminal investigation of his own actions . With Starr likely to send an impeachment report to Congress , the White House hoped to frame the debate in a way that focuses attention on the sex aspects of the case rather than allegations of obstruction of justice .

source: I grew up with a 60 ? s pink bathroom and have often wished it had white tile . It is n't that sweet pale pink ; it 's a strong pink . My sister &; I joked about it being Pepto Pink . I have recently inherited the house with that pink bathroom ( and a green bathroom ) . I really considered " destroying " them both ; my niece convinced me not to . So one night while searching for ideas for the bathroom , I came across the " Save the Pink Bathrooms " website . Now , I am excited about my pink bathroom and the decorating possibilities ! ! I promise to cherish &; save the pink bathroom ! !
domestication: 小时候，我家里的卫生间是60年代的粉色，总觉得不太满意，希望能换成白色的瓷砖。不是说粉色不好看，但那种颜色实在太过鲜艳了。我和妹妹开玩笑说它的颜色就像消化药一样难看。最近，我继承了这个房子，连同粉色卫生间（还有一个绿色的）在内。起初我真的想把它们整个改掉，但是我的侄女却劝我不要这么做。一天晚上，我在网上寻找装饰卫生间的灵感，偶然发现了一个叫做“拯救粉色卫生间”的网站。现在，我开始喜欢上了自己的粉色卫生间，并且有了很多装饰想法！我保证会好好珍惜并保留这间粉色卫生间！
foreignization: 我在一个有60年代风格的粉色浴室中长大，并且常常希望它是白色的瓷砖。那不是甜美的淡粉色；那是一个强烈的粉色。我的妹妹和我开玩笑说它是Pepto粉色（一种粉红色）。最近，我继承了这栋房子，里面有粉色浴室（和一个绿色浴室）。我真的考虑过“毁掉”它们；我的侄女说服我不要这样做。所以，一天晚上，我在寻找浴室装饰理念时，偶然发现了“拯救粉色浴室”的网站。现在，我很兴奋地拥有粉色浴室和装饰可能性！！！我承诺珍惜并拯救粉色浴室！！！

source: Sikhism : Sikhism was created in reaction to the conflict between Hinduism and Islam , and carries on many of Hinduism 's influences -- although Sikhs are monotheistic . " Evil " is merely human selfishness . Salvation is attained by living an honest life and meditating on god . If performed sufficiently , the worshipper is released from the cycle of reincarnation and becomes one with god .
domestication: 锡克教是一种在印度教和伊斯兰教冲突的背景下诞生的宗教，它保留了许多印度教的影响，但又有所不同——尽管锡克教徒也信奉一神论。“邪恶”只不过是人类的自私自利。通过过诚实的生活并冥想神灵，可以获得救赎。如果修行得法，信徒就可以摆脱轮回的循环，与神融为一体。当然，这种修行的方法各有千秋，但核心思想是相同的。锡克教告诉人们，要做个好人，过好这一生，不要被名利所迷惑，否则就只能继续轮回，永远不能得道成佛。
foreignization: 锡克教： 锡克教是在印度教和伊斯兰教冲突的基础上产生的，保留了许多印度教的影响——尽管锡克教徒是一神论者。 “邪恶”仅仅是人类的自私。通过过诚实的生活和冥想上帝来实现救赎。如果做得足够充分，崇拜者将从转世循环中解脱出来并与上帝合一。

source: Washington , November 8 , 2012 -- With a comprehensive " grand bargain " agreement on taxes and spending unlikely to succeed in the lame duck session , there is a strong possibility that sequestration will commence on January 2 , argue experts David W. Barno , Nora Bensahel , Joel Smith and Jacob Stokes in Countdown to Sequestration : Why American Leaders Could Jump Off the Fiscal Cliff , released today by the Center for a New American Security ( CNAS ) .
domestication: 华盛顿，二零一二年十一月八日，有专家预测，美国国会难以就税收和开支达成全面性的“大协议”，因此很可能会在明年一月二号启动自动削减计划。这几个专家是大卫·巴尔诺、诺拉·本塞赫尔、乔尔·史密斯和雅各布·斯托克斯，他们在今日由新美国安全中心（Center for a New American Security，简称CNAS）发布的《自动削减倒计时：为什么美国领导人可能会跳下财政悬崖》报告中提出了上述观点。
foreignization: 华盛顿，2012年11月8日——鉴于全面性的“大协议”（grand bargain）在税收和支出方面不太可能在跛脚鸭会议中成功，因此削减开支很可能会在一月二号开始实施。这是专家David W. Barno、Nora Bensahel、Joel Smith和Jacob Stokes在Center for a New American Security（CNAS）今日发布的《削减开支倒计时：为什么美国领导人会跳下财政悬崖》（Countdown to Sequestration: Why American Leaders Could Jump Off the Fiscal Cliff）一书中的论点。

source: Roast . Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or foil . Spread the vegetables on the sheet and roast in the oven for 30-40 minutes . They 're ready when they start to brown and are tender . The onions will probably cook faster than the squash , so check and remove them early if necessary so they do n't burn .
domestication: 烤。把烤盘铺上烘焙纸或铝箔，倒上蔬菜，放进烤箱，烤三十到四十分钟，直到它们开始变棕色且变得柔软。通常情况下，洋葱会比南瓜熟得快一点，所以要不时地看看，如果快烧焦了，就及早取出来吧，这样才能做出美味的菜肴。
foreignization: 烘烤。用烘焙纸或铝箔铺在烘烤盘上。在盘上铺开蔬菜，在烤箱中烘烤30-40分钟。当它们开始变棕色且变软时，它们就可以了。洋葱可能会比南瓜熟得更快，所以如果需要的话，请提前检查并将它们取出，以免烧焦。

source: The order disintegrates : During the transition from a crystalline to an amorphous silica structure , rings with five and seven atoms appear first , elements with a larger deviation from the hexagonal rings of the crystalline structure can be found only deeper in the disordered region . Credit : Markus Heyde/Fritz Haber Institute of the MPG
domestication: 随着晶体结构向无定形硅结构转变，五个和七个原子的环状结构开始出现，而与晶体结构六边形环偏差较大的元素，只能在无序区域的更深处找到。来源：马克·海德/马克斯-普朗克学会弗里茨哈伯研究所

source: A good client / designer relationship is one that has an inevitable outcome . nOne where the client has been involved , knows what 's coming and the outcome seems inevitable . nInevitability is a much undervalued term in design . It comes from having a shared vision of the future . nOne where both of you can see the steps to take you towards or away from the vision . nIt can feel far better than the big tad-dah , which can go wrong . n
domestication: 一个好客户和设计师的关系就好像是有个必然的结果，客户参与其中，知道会发生什么，而结果也似乎是理所当然的。在设计领域，“必然性”是一种被低估的概念，它源于对未来的共同愿景，这意味着你和客户都能看到通往或远离这个愿景的步骤。这种感觉比大张旗鼓的“惊喜”更好，因为惊喜有时会出错。
foreignization: 良好的客户/设计师关系是具有必然结果的。这种关系中，客户已经参与其中，知道将要发生什么，而结果似乎不可避免。必然性是在设计中一个被低估的术语，它源自对未来的共同愿景。这种愿景中，双方都能看到通往或远离该愿景的步骤。这可能比大而喧闹的结局更令人满意，而后者可能会出错。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

A good client / designer relationship is one that has an inevitable outcome . nOne where the client has been involved , knows what 's coming and the outcome seems inevitable . nInevitability is a much undervalued term in design . It comes from having a shared vision of the future . nOne where both of you can see the steps to take you towards or away from the vision . nIt can feel far better than the big tad-dah , which can go wrong . n
一个好客户和设计师的关系就好像是有个必然的结果，客户参与其中，知道会发生什么，而结果也似乎是理所当然的。在设计领域，“必然性”是一种被低估的概念，它源于对未来的共同愿景，这意味着你和客户都能看到通往或远离这个愿景的步骤。这种感觉比大张旗鼓的“惊喜”更好，因为惊喜有时会出错。

source: ESTES KEFAUVER : This is Estes Kefauver . The General 's promise to bring down prices was another broken promise . Since the Republicans took office the cost of living has reached its highest point in history . Today the consumer can buy less food , less housing , less clothing , less medical care than he could in nineteen hundred and fifty-two for the same money . The General promised a change for the better , and we got shortchanged for the worse . Think it through .  Share  Save
domestication: 我是埃斯蒂斯·凯福瓦。将军曾承诺降低物价，但这又是一个破碎的承诺。自从共和党上台后，生活成本已经达到了历史最高点。如今，消费者花同样的钱，却买不到和1952年一样多的食物、住房、衣服和医疗保健。这就是将军所谓的“改善”吗？我们被骗了，事情反而变得更糟糕。仔细想想吧！

source: Show students how to use the balance pan ; they can place expressions in each side of the balance pan to solve two equations simultaneously . For example , place - ( x 2 ) + 6* x . Note : It is important to show students that the tool requires the * for multiplication , and exponents , such as the power of 2 , can be shown by 2 . Next , place 2* x in the right pan . Since both expressions equal y , by the Transitive Property of Equality , they should be equal to each other . Slowly move the slider to find out when the pans are balanced . The value for x may also be typed in the blue . Students should notice that when x = 4 , the pans are balanced . They should also notice that the value of the expression , 8 , is displayed above the pans , indicating the height .
domestication: 给学生们演示一下如何使用天平：他们可以在天平的两边分别放置表达式，以同时求解两个方程。例如，放置 -(x^2) + 6*x。注意：非常重要的是让学生们了解这个工具需要使用 * 来表示乘法，而指数，如2的平方，可以用2来表示。接下来，在右侧的天平上放置 2*x。由于两个表达式都等于y，因此根据等式的传递性，它们应该彼此相等。慢慢移动滑块，观察当天平平衡时的情况。变量x的值也可以输入到蓝色区域。学生们应该注意，当x = 4时，天平是平衡的。他们还应该注意到，表达式的值 8 出现在天平上方，表示高度。通过这种方式，学生们可以形象地理解方程式的解，以及如何使用工具来求解方程。
foreignization: 向学生展示如何使用平衡托盘；他们可以在平衡托盘的每一侧放置表达式，以同时求解两个方程。例如，放置 - ( x 2 ) + 6 * x 。注意：重要的是向学生展示该工具需要乘法的 * ，并且可以通过 2 来显示指数，如 2 的幂。接下来，在右侧托盘中放置 2 * x 。由于两个表达式都等于 y ，根据等式的传递性，它们应该彼此相等。慢慢移动滑块以确定托盘何时平衡。 x 的值也可以输入蓝色区域。学生应该注意，当 x = 4 时，托盘是平衡的。他们还应该注意到表达式的值 8 显示在托盘上方，表示高度。

source: The existence of a skilled workforce is an indicator of both the presence of industries that need them and a measure of a state 's ability to educate or attract skilled workers . Thus , workforce quality can be improved both by investing in education and by creating a business-friendly environment that attracts knowledge-intensive businesses and the skilled workforce that these businesses employ .
domestication: 一个地方是否拥有高技能的劳动力，既可以反映出该地区是否拥有需要这种劳动力的产业，也是衡量一个国家能否培养或吸引高技能劳动力的重要指标。因此，要提高劳动力的质量，可以通过投资教育来实现，也可以通过创造有利于企业发展的环境来吸引知识密集型企业和这些企业所雇用的高技能劳动力。这样一来，大家都有工作做，企业也能发展，政府也能收税，皆大欢喜。
foreignization: 高素质劳动力队伍的存在既是需要他们的行业存在的标志，也是衡量一个国家能够教育或吸引高素质劳动力的能力的尺度。因此，劳动力质量可以通过投资于教育和创造一个友好的商业环境来提高，友好的商业环境可以吸引知识密集型企业和这些企业雇佣的高素质劳动力。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The existence of a skilled workforce is an indicator of both the presence of industries that need them and a measure of a state 's ability to educate or attract skilled workers . Thus , workforce quality can be improved both by investing in education and by creating a business-friendly environment that attracts knowledge-intensive businesses and the skilled workforce that these businesses employ .

source: There are plenty of issues Connecticut will face in the next few years . The legislators we elect will decide on one bill to allow cell towers in public parks . Another would allow utility companies to cut trees on your property without your permission . Yet others would allow more pesticide applications near elementary schools . There are handfuls of legislation ahead that will affect the nature of Connecticut .

source: INEVITABLE NOT TA-DAHA good client / designer relationship is one that has an inevitable outcome.One where the client has been involved , knows whats coming and the outcome seems inevitable.Inevitability is a much undervalued term in design . It starts with a shared vision of the future.One where both of you can see the steps to take you towards or away from the vision.It can feel far better than the big tad-dah , which can go wrong .
domestication: 一个好客户和设计师的关系就像一场势在必行的好戏。这种关系中，客户完全融入其中，知道会发生什么，而且结果似乎已经注定。不可避免性是一种在设计中被低估的概念，它源于对未来的共同愿景。你和客户都能看到通往或远离这个愿景的步骤。这种感觉比那些大张旗鼓的效果（譬如“惊喜”）要好得多，因为后者可能会适得其反。
foreignization: 不可避免不是 TA-DAHA 良好的客户/设计师关系是一种具有不可避免结果的关系。一种客户已参与、知道会发生什么、结果似乎不可避免的关系。在设计中，不可避免是一个被低估的术语。它始于对未来的共同愿景。你们两人都能看到通往或远离该愿景的步骤。这可能比大型的“魔术揭秘时刻”（tad-dah）感觉好得多，而后者可能会出错。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It starts with a shared vision of the future.One where both of you can see the steps to take you towards or away from the vision.It can feel far better than the big tad-dah , which can go wrong .

source: In the end , the thinking behind the producers ' decision to go light on science and heavy on ideology in Mr. Hockenberry 's questioning and in the editing of the piece becomes clear . The takeaway from " Climate of Doubt " is that science and its evidence are of secondary importance in the skeptics ' world .
domestication: 结果证明，制作方决定在霍肯贝利的提问中少谈科学、多谈意识形态，并在剪辑中突出这一点，其背后的想法变得清晰起来。从“疑虑气候”这个节目中，我们可以得出一个结论：在怀疑论者的世界里，科学及其证据是次要的，只有意识形态才是最重要的。这其实也揭露了他们的用心，那就是先入为主地否定科学事实，坚持自己的观点。
foreignization: 最后，制作人决定在Hockenberry先生的提问和文章编辑中轻视科学而重视意识形态的想法变得清晰起来。从“Climate of Doubt”中可以看出，科学及其证据在怀疑论者的世界里是次要的。

source: Still , the most controversial component of the law - the requirement that nearly all Americans obtain health insurance -- does not sit well with the American public . In that same March poll , 45 percent approve of that provision , but 51 percent do not . According to an April Kaiser Family Foundation survey , seven in ten find that element of the law unfavorable
domestication: 尽管如此，这项法律中最有争议的部分——几乎所有美国人都必须购买健康保险——并没有得到美国公众的好评。在同一份三月份的民意调查中，45%的受访者赞成这一规定，但有51%的人表示反对。根据四月份凯撒家庭基金会的调查，十个人中就有七个认为这一规定不利。看来，强制购买保险这一招还是让很多人不太满意，总觉得政府在强迫他们做什么似的。
foreignization: 然而，该法案中最具争议的组成部分，即要求几乎所有美国人购买健康保险的规定，并不符合美国公众的口味。在同一个三月份的民意调查中，45％的人赞同这一规定，但有51％的人表示反对。根据四月份凯撒家庭基金会的调查，十人中有七人认为该法案的这一要素令人不满。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Still , the most controversial component of the law - the requirement that nearly all Americans obtain health insurance -- does not sit well with the American public . In that same March poll , 45 percent approve of that provision , but 51 percent do not . According to an April Kaiser Family Foundation survey , seven in ten find that element of the law unfavorable

source: But despite the Presidential intervals of George Bush , Barack Obama , and others , it remains a fact that our great men and women who serve in uniform do so longer than the terms served by Washington D.C. politicians . It 's a real commitment to make . That commitment affects families , friends , children , and communities . That 's why it 's an honorable commitment . It 's a lifetime gig and it is no luxury . Our men and women in uniform deserve mention every time a commander-in-chief or one applying for the job stands to address the country -- it 's the epitome of unity .
domestication: 尽管乔治·布什、巴拉克·奥巴马等总统任期有限，但有一点却是毋庸置疑的，那就是我们的伟大军人，比那些在华盛顿特区当政客的总统任期还要长。 这是一个需要付出巨大努力的承诺，这个承诺会影响到他们的家人、朋友、孩子和社区。正因为如此，这是一个值得尊敬的承诺。这是一辈子的职业，并且不是一件轻松的事情。每当总司令或某个竞选总司令站出来向国家发表讲话时，我们的军人都理应被提及——这是团结的最高体现。
foreignization: 尽管乔治·布什、巴拉克·奥巴马等总统任期内，美国军人服役的时间依然比华盛顿特区政客任职时间长。 这是一个需要承诺的事情。 这个承诺影响家庭、朋友、孩子和社区。 因此，这是一个光荣的承诺。 它是一生的工作，并且不是一种奢侈。 每当总司令或竞选总司令的人站在国家面前发表讲话时，我们的军人理应被提及——这是团结的典范。

Our men and women in uniform deserve mention every time a commander-in-chief or one applying for the job stands to address the country -- it 's the epitome of unity .

source: We do n't need a great speaker . We need a president who loves this country and will work to put it back on the right track . In 2008 people voted for all the utopian rhetoric and we ended up with an inexperienced , thin-skinned , empty suit hack who hides his past , apologizes for America and is determined to turn America into a divided third-world country .
domestication: 我们不需要一个伟大的演说家，我们需要一个爱这个国家的总统，并且会努力让它重回正轨。在2008年，人们投票支持所有乌托邦式的空话，结果我们却得到了一个毫无经验、玻璃心、空有其表的政客，他隐藏自己的过去，为美国道歉，并且决心把美国变成一个分裂的第三世界国家。你看，这些人说得天花乱坠，但做起来呢？他们只会把国家带入黑暗，让美国失去往日的辉煌。
foreignization: 我们不需要一位伟大的演说家，我们需要一位热爱这个国家并且会努力使其重回正轨的总统。 2008年，人们投票支持所有乌托邦式的修辞，我们最终得到了一个缺乏经验、皮薄、空洞的家伙，他隐藏了自己的过去，为美国道歉，并决心把美国变成一个分裂的第三世界国家。

source: MOTOKO RICH I really enjoyed Page One . As you 've probably heard , we had a staff screening in the Times Center and it was great to feel the warmth in the room for our friends in the film . I thought David Carr was a phenomenal movie presence , and Bruce Headlam was a break-out star . ( Did you see his appearance on The Daily Show ? The movie was n't a fluke ... ) And along with Brian Stelter , Tim Arango and Richard Perez-Pena , they all came across as fighting the good fight for the journalism we believe in .
domestication: 我真的很喜欢《第一版》这部电影。你可能已经知道了，我们在时代中心举办了一场员工放映会，感觉到大家对电影中朋友们的热情和支持真是太好了。我觉得大卫·卡尔是一位出色的电影明星，而布鲁斯·海德拉姆则是一颗冉冉升起的新星（你看过他在《每日秀》上的表现吗？这部电影不是偶然成功的...）。此外，布莱恩·斯特尔特、蒂姆·阿兰戈和理查德·佩雷斯-佩纳都让我觉得他们是在为我们所信仰的新闻业而奋斗，这真的很棒。

source: The negative reviews for " The Tree of Life " smacks of philistinism . Where is it written that every movie has to be spelled out for its audience ? I think a lot of critics went into the film with their minds already made up . I hope Brad Pitt gets nominated for the right film . And Jessica Chastain gives the best mute performance since Samantha Morton in " Sweet and Lowdown " . What , all of a sudden , people hate dinosaurs ? Terrence Malick can do whatever he damn well pleases . He 's earned that right .
domestication: 有人对《生命之树》的负面评价，简直是无知至极。哪里有规定每部电影都必须把剧情详细解释给观众听？我觉得很多影评人在看这部电影之前就已经有了成见。我希望布拉德·皮特能因为这部好电影而被提名。杰西卡·查斯坦的表演堪称近年来最好的默演，堪比萨曼莎·莫顿在《甜蜜与低调》中的表现。难道人们突然间都讨厌恐龙了吗？特伦斯·马利克可以随心所欲地创作，他已经有这个资格了。
foreignization: 对《生命之树》的负面评价充满了庸俗的味道。哪里有规定每部电影都必须把剧情全部展现给观众？我认为很多影评人在观看这部电影时，他们的脑子里已经有了成见。我希望布拉德·皮特能因为出演这部合适的电影而获得提名。而杰西卡·查斯坦在《甜蜜与低调》之后，给出了最好的哑剧表演。怎么了，人们突然就讨厌恐龙了？特伦斯·马利克可以随心所欲地做他想做的事。他已经赢得了这个权利。

And Jessica Chastain gives the best mute performance since Samantha Morton in " Sweet and Lowdown " . What , all of a sudden , people hate dinosaurs ? Terrence Malick can do whatever he damn well pleases . He 's earned that right .

source: Leading the push for the King family is Cousin Hugh ( Beau Bridges ) . As affable as Bridges can be , he does n't want to listen to any woo-woo Green nonsense about not selling . The film follows Clooney 's character 's legal , family and emotional troubles in careful detail , until director Alexander Payne shows us , without forcing it , that they are all coiled together . We get vested in the lives of the characters . We come to understand how they think , and care about what they decide about the substantial moral problems underlying the plot .
domestication: 金家族的主导者是休叔叔（由比尔·布里奇斯扮演）。虽然布里奇斯通常很讨人喜欢，但他并不想听那些令人头晕的环保废话，坚决不卖地。电影详细讲述了克鲁尼饰演的角色所面临的法律、家庭和情感问题，直到导演亚历山大·佩恩巧妙地揭示出它们之间的联系，让我们逐渐投入到这些角色的人生中，我们开始了解他们的思维方式，并关心他们在应对剧情中重大道德困境时会做出的决定。
foreignization: 在金一家的推动下，表弟休（豪尔赫·布里吉斯）带头。就像桥梁一样亲切，他不想听任何关于不卖的胡言乱语的胡说八道。该片跟随克鲁尼的角色，法律、家庭和情感的麻烦，详细介绍，直到导演亚历山大·佩恩向我们展示，没有强迫，他们都是交织在一起的。我们参与了角色们的生活。我们开始了解他们的想法，并关心他们决定的重要的道德问题。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Leading the push for the King family is Cousin Hugh ( Beau Bridges ) . As affable as Bridges can be , he does n't want to listen to any woo-woo Green nonsense about not selling . The film follows Clooney 's character 's legal , family and emotional troubles in careful detail , until director Alexander Payne shows us , without forcing it , that they are all coiled together . We get vested in the lives of the characters . We come to understand how they think , and care about what they decide about the substantial moral problems underlying the plot .

Leading the push for the King family is Cousin Hugh ( Beau Bridges ) . As affable as Bridges can be , he does n't want to listen to any woo-woo Green nonsense about not selling . The film follows Clooney 's character 's legal , family and emotional troubles in careful detail , until director Alexander Payne shows us , without forcing it , that they are all coiled together . We get vested in the lives of the characters . We come to understand how they think , and care about what they decide about the substantial moral problems underlying the plot .
在金一家的推动下，表弟休（豪尔赫·布里吉斯）带头。就像桥梁一样亲切，他不想听任何关于不卖的胡言乱语的胡说八道。该片跟随克鲁尼的角色，法律、家庭和情感的麻烦，详细介绍，直到导演亚历山大·佩恩向我们展示，没有强迫，他们都是交织在一起的。我们参与了角色们的生活。我们开始了解他们的想法，并关心他们决定的重要的道德问题。

source: Rick Perry 's already lackluster presidential bid went on a deathwatch after his debate debacle . In talking to the many who have known Perry over the years , fellow Texan Bryan Burrough discovers the surprising reasons behind the campaign 's train wreck and how Perry , with an unbroken string of nine political victories , might yet stage a comeback -- despite his shocking backroom dealings with big campaign donors , the rumors about gay affairs and painkiller use , and the nasty bullying tactics he has used to implement a truly radical agenda .
domestication: 里克·佩里的总统竞选原本就没什么起色，這下子在辩论中出糗后更是到了崩溃的边缘。德州人布莱恩·伯勒经过与佩里多年的相处後发现，佩里竞选活动失败的原因出乎意料，尽管佩里已经连续九次政治胜利，但他仍可能东山再起——尽管他有令人震惊的大笔竞选捐款，在背后操作、有关同性恋和止痛药使用的谣言，以及他用来实施激进议程的卑鄙的手段。

source: Though the temporary capitol of Portland was the largest city in the state many thought a permanent capitol should be more centrally located . A number of cities and towns sought the honor of becoming the state capitol and site of the new State House . The principal aspirants were Portland , Brunswick , Hallowell , Waterville , Belfast , Wiscasset and Augusta . The Legislature finally selected the City of Augusta , and Governor Enoch Lincoln signed the bill establishing Augusta as the official capitol on February 24 , 1827 .
domestication: 在缅因州，波特兰市是临时州首府，也是全州最大的城市，但很多人觉得永久性的州首府应该位于更中间的位置。因此，一些城市和城镇争相成为州首府和新州议会大厦的所在地。主要的竞争者包括波特兰、布伦瑞克、哈洛威尔、沃特维尔、贝尔法斯特、威斯卡西特和奥古斯塔等。最后，立法机构选定了奥古斯塔市，州长伊诺奇·林肯于1827年2月24日签署法案，正式确立奥古斯塔为州首府。

source: Not only was it the first time since NFL realignment in 2002 that all four teams in a division were tied as late as Week 6 , it gave the other teams in the AFC East , namely the Bills and Dolphins , who had finished third and fourth in the division each of the previous three years , hope they might unseat the Patriots from their lofty perch .

source: The United States won independence from the king because he failed to protect the people . The king became the invader . source: The financial statements are presented in United States dollars . In accordance with ASC 830 ? Foreign Currency Translation ? , foreign denominated monetary assets and liabilities are translated into United States dollars at rates of exchange in effect at the balance sheet date . Non-monetary items , including equity , are translated at the historical rate of exchange . Revenues and expenses are translated at the average rates of exchange during the year . During the year ended July 31 , 2012 , the company had immaterial translation loss due to cash translation which was deemed to be irrelevant .
domestication: 这家公司的财报全部以美元表示。按照美国会计准则第830条——外币翻译的规定，以外币表示的货币性资产和负债，都以资产负债表日期当天的汇率折算成美元。而非货币性项目，包括股权，则以历史汇率进行折算。收入和支出则按照年度平均汇率进行折算。在2012年7月31日结束的一年里，由于现金汇率的波动，这家公司产生了一点微不足道的汇兑损失，不过这点损失实在太小了，几乎可以忽略不计。

source: Even if it WAS N'T that cold , it is still wrong to hold people -- especially children , in like that and refuse to let them leave when they are asking to leave . And you , I 'm assuming , are either a teenager or an adult and therefore will not experience hypothermia or frostbite as quickly as small children will . Do some research .
domestication: 就算天气不是很冷，把人，尤其是孩子们关在那里，不让他们离开也是不对的，更何况他们还在求着离开呢。你应该是个青少年或者成年人，肯定比小孩子能更耐冷，不会这么快就患上低体温症或冻伤。多去查查资料吧。
foreignization: 即使天气不是很冷，将人们，特别是孩子们关在里面，不让他们离开，当他们要求离开时，这也是不对的。而你，我假设，你要么是青少年，要么是成年人，因此不会像小孩子那样快速地患上低体温症或冻伤。做一些研究。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even if it WAS N'T that cold , it is still wrong to hold people -- especially children , in like that and refuse to let them leave when they are asking to leave . And you , I 'm assuming , are either a teenager or an adult and therefore will not experience hypothermia or frostbite as quickly as small children will . Do some research .

source: The decision abruptly ends the public-service career of one of the military 's most vaunted leaders . He led the surge in Iraq , and was later tapped to lead U.S. and NATO forces in Afghanistan -- following two years at the helm of U.S. Central Command . In April 2011 , Obama again tapped Petraeus to lead the CIA .
domestication: 这次决定突然终结了军队中一位最有名的领导人的一切公职生涯。他曾经率领美军在伊拉克展开反击，并且后来被选中领导美国及北约部队在阿富汗作战--在此之前他在美国中央司令部任职两年。2011年四月，奥巴马再次选中他去领导中情局。

source: So you can imagine my surprise when , on a recent trip to the Animal Kingdom 's Yak &; Yeti restaurant , she consumed nearly the entire plate of wok-fried green beans we had ordered for the table . It was one of those parenting moments where you hold your breath and move slowly so as to avoid breaking the spell .

source: J.K. Rowling initially considered having Arthur or Ron as the Weasley casualty but decided to give reprieve to both as they form an integral part of the series . She ultimately settled on having Fred killed as it serves two purposes : to give a sense of loss for George and the payoff of Percy 's rivalry against his Ministry 's arch-rival Rookwood ( who was revealed to be a Death Eater ) .
domestication: J.K. 罗琳最初打算让韦斯利家族中的亚瑟或者罗恩去死，但是后来决定饶了他们，因为他们都是故事中的重要人物。她最后决定让弗雷德去死，这样可以达到两个目的：一方面让乔治有所失去，另一方面也能让珀西和魔法部宿敌鲁克伍德的对立得到回报（因为鲁克伍德原来是个食死徒）。
foreignization: J.K. Rowling最初考虑让Arthur 或 Ron 成为韦斯利家族的牺牲者，但决定宽恕他们两人，因为他们是系列故事的重要组成部分。她最终决定让Fred 死去，这有两个目的：让George 感到失去，以及展现珀西与他在魔法部的宿敌鲁克伍德（被揭露是一名食死徒）的对立。

J.K. Rowling initially considered having Arthur or Ron as the Weasley casualty but decided to give reprieve to both as they form an integral part of the series . source: If you want the best sushi in my area , you oddly skip the Asian-owned places , and go with two small places in strip malls . Each is owned by white guys ( though one of them is married to a Japanese woman , and her family helps out ) who spent several years living and learning in Japan and who still shut down for 2-3 weeks in the off season to go back to Japan for a refresher on proper technique .
domestication: 如果你想在我的地区吃到最好的寿司，你可能会有些奇怪地忽略那些由亚洲人开的店，而去两个位于购物中心的较小的店铺。每家店都是由白人老板所有（尽管其中一家老板娶了一位日本妻子，她的家人也会帮忙），他们在日本生活和学习了几年，每年淡季还会休业二三周回到日本去学习正宗的制作技巧。这些老板对日本料理有着深厚的感情，这从他们的做菜中就能体现出来。
foreignization: 如果你想要我所在地区最好的寿司，你反而会跳过亚裔拥有的店铺，而选择两个位于商业街的小地方。每一个都是由白人男人拥有的（尽管其中一家老板结婚的对象是日本女人，她的家庭也会帮助料理），他们在日本居住和学习了几年，并且在淡季仍然会休业2-3周回到日本进行技术知识的复习。

source: The problem is that so many people lived on earth but never received baptism . Many of them never even had a chance to receive baptism . So Jesus provided a way for all those hosts of the dead to be on equal footing with the most righteous of saints . We can be baptized in their behalf in our temples . We can offer them the ordinance of baptism and the Gift of the Holy Ghost , which they are free to receive if they so desire .
domestication: 问题在于这么多人活着却没受过洗礼，其中很多人甚至连受洗的机会都没有。因此，耶稣提供了一种方法，让那些死去的人和最有道德的圣徒站在同一个起跑线上。在我们的寺庙里，我们可以替他们受洗礼，为他们提供洗礼和圣灵的礼物，这些都是他们可以自由选择接受的。
foreignization: 问题是地球上有这么多人从未接受过洗礼。他们中很多人甚至从未有机会接受过洗礼。所以耶稣为所有死者的军队提供了一种方法，使他们与最义的人一样平等的对待。我们可以在寺庙里代表他们施洗，我们可以为他们提供洗礼和圣灵的恩赐，这些他们如果愿意的话就可以接受。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The problem is that so many people lived on earth but never received baptism . Many of them never even had a chance to receive baptism . So Jesus provided a way for all those hosts of the dead to be on equal footing with the most righteous of saints . We can be baptized in their behalf in our temples . We can offer them the ordinance of baptism and the Gift of the Holy Ghost , which they are free to receive if they so desire .

source: In this context , it is interesting to note that levels of endotoxin in house dust are reported to be lower in families with allergic parents 25 . This can potentially reflect the number of bacteria that the infant encounters as it has previously been shown that higher endotoxin levels are associated with an increased number of bifidobacteria species in infant feces 4 .
domestication: 值得注意的是，在有过敏父母的家庭中，家尘中的内毒素含量据报道却比较低。这种现象可能与婴儿接触到的细菌数量有关，因为之前的研究已经表明，内毒素含量越高，婴儿粪便中双歧杆菌的种类就越多。也许这可以从侧面反映出，婴儿在成长过程中接触到更多种类的细菌，对其免疫系统的发育是有益的。这也许能解释为什么有些研究发现，家里有宠物或农场环境，孩子患过敏性疾病的几率会降低。
foreignization: 在这种情况下，有一个有趣的现象是，过敏性父母所在家庭的家中灰尘中的内毒素含量被报告为较低的25。这可能反映了婴儿遇到的细菌的数量，因为之前已经证明更高的内毒素水平与婴儿粪便中双歧杆菌种类的增加有关4。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In this context , it is interesting to note that levels of endotoxin in house dust are reported to be lower in families with allergic parents 25 . This can potentially reflect the number of bacteria that the infant encounters as it has previously been shown that higher endotoxin levels are associated with an increased number of bifidobacteria species in infant feces 4 .
值得注意的是，在有过敏父母的家庭中，家尘中的内毒素含量据报道却比较低。这种现象可能与婴儿接触到的细菌数量有关，因为之前的研究已经表明，内毒素含量越高，婴儿粪便中双歧杆菌的种类就越多。也许这可以从侧面反映出，婴儿在成长过程中接触到更多种类的细菌，对其免疫系统的发育是有益的。这也许能解释为什么有些研究发现，家里有宠物或农场环境，孩子患过敏性疾病的几率会降低。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In this context , it is interesting to note that levels of endotoxin in house dust are reported to be lower in families with allergic parents 25 . This can potentially reflect the number of bacteria that the infant encounters as it has previously been shown that higher endotoxin levels are associated with an increased number of bifidobacteria species in infant feces 4 .
在这种情况下，有一个有趣的现象是，过敏性父母所在家庭的家中灰尘中的内毒素含量被报告为较低的25。这可能反映了婴儿遇到的细菌的数量，因为之前已经证明更高的内毒素水平与婴儿粪便中双歧杆菌种类的增加有关4。

source: 8. they heard the voice of the Lord God walking in the garden-The divine Being appeared in the same manner as formerly-uttering the well-known tones of kindness , walking in some visible form ( not running hastily , as one impelled by the influence of angry feelings ) . How beautifully expressive are these words of the familiar and condescending manner in which He had hitherto held intercourse with the first pair .
domestication: 他们听到了主上帝在园中行走的声音，完全是老样子。上帝的出现和以前一样，还是那么和蔼亲切，带着关爱的语调，走路有声，却不着急，也不是被怒气冲昏了头脑而匆忙。这些话语实在太美好了，充分体现了上帝一贯以来与亚当夏娃的交谈方式，充满了亲切和恩惠。
foreignization: 8. 他们听到了上帝的主的声音，在园中行走——神圣的存在体以与以前相同的方式出现，发出那些著名的仁慈音调，以某种可见的形式行走（不是匆忙地奔跑，因为受到了愤怒情绪的驱使）。这些话多么美丽地表达了他迄今为止与第一对人以熟悉和屈尊的方式交往的方式。

source: " Sometimes . When something happened that they could n't explain , I 'd always get in trouble . He 'd smack me and I 'd get locked in the cupboard under the stairs . If I was absolutely silent , sometimes I 'd get dinner . " Harry 's voice was dead , with no emotion whatsoever . He might as well have been reading from the encyclopaedia . He 'd never told anyone how the Dursleys had treated him , but Draco was his friend , and Harry knew friends talked to each other .
domestication: 小时候，有时候家里发生了他们无法解释的事情，我就会惹上麻烦。他会打我，然后我会被锁在楼梯下面的储物柜里。如果我完全不出声，有时我还能吃到晚饭。哈利的声音毫无生气，就像是在读百科全书一样。他从来没有告诉任何人德思礼一家是怎么对他的，但德拉科是他的朋友，哈利知道朋友之间应该分享自己的秘密。
foreignization: “有时候。当发生了他们无法解释的事情时，我总是会惹上麻烦。他会打我，然后我会被锁在楼梯下的橱柜里。如果我绝对保持沉默，有时我就能吃到晚饭。”哈利的声音毫无生气，完全没有任何情感。他读起来就像是在读百科全书一样。他以前从来没有告诉任何人邓布利一家是如何对他的，但德拉科是他的朋友，哈利知道朋友们彼此都会讲这些。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" Sometimes . When something happened that they could n't explain , I 'd always get in trouble . He 'd smack me and I 'd get locked in the cupboard under the stairs . If I was absolutely silent , sometimes I 'd get dinner . " Harry 's voice was dead , with no emotion whatsoever . He might as well have been reading from the encyclopaedia . He 'd never told anyone how the Dursleys had treated him , but Draco was his friend , and Harry knew friends talked to each other .

source: >> Where to buy 23-inch LCD HDTV . This Sony TV is one of the few currently available small-screen LCD TVs with a digital tuner . source: Also , for example , when you have lots of " if " clauses , those languages force us to use mutable state ( and a variable initialized as null ) just to avoid early exits . But we can avoid both by treating the " if " as an expression , as in Ruby , Lisp , etc , or with the ternary conditional operator ...
domestication: 举个例子，当你有很多“if”语句时，一些语言会强迫我们使用可变状态（和一个初始化为null的变量），只是为了避免提前退出。但是，我们可以通过把“if”当作一个表达式来处理，例如在Ruby、Lisp等语言中，或者使用三元条件运算符来避免这两种情况。这其实是语言设计上的一个很巧妙的方法，可以让代码变得更加优雅和简洁。
foreignization: 此外，例如，当我们有很多“if”子句时，这些语言迫使我们使用可变状态（和初始化为null的变量）仅仅是为了避免过早退出。但是，我们可以通过将“if”作为一个表达式（如Ruby，Lisp等），或者使用三元条件运算符来同时避免这两种情况。

messages_domestication.content:

Also , for example , when you have lots of " if " clauses , those languages force us to use mutable state ( and a variable initialized as null ) just to avoid early exits . source: There was a successful effort to restrict blacks from voting in Florida in November , 2000 . Not only was the effort successful , because the success was not reported on Fox News , many believe it never happened . When the documentary on the subject " Unprecedented " was shown and advertised in my local newspaper , I was the only person in the city to attend . While efforts to block blacks from voting have been less overt since 2000 , one would be foolish to believe that the success in 2000 would not be followed by more efforts in this direction .

The Senate on Tuesday was scheduled to take up more mundane business -- whether 41 polar bear carcasses killed before a 2008 ban on polar bear trophy imports can be brought into the U.S. from Canada . And the House was expected to approve legislation that would exclude U.S. airlines from emissions requirements that the European Union has sought to impose on all planes flying to and from Europe .

source: I think MLB umpires are a little over the top , but it is important for refs to maintain control of the game and players . That 's why they are there . If players see that other people are getting away with stuff , they will do it too . No one wants to play against an unfair advantage where some players are dirty and get away with it , so it escalates until the refs assert control .
domestication: 我觉得美国职业棒球大联盟的裁判可能有点过于激动，但裁判维持比赛和球员的秩序是很重要的。这就是他们在那里存在的意义。如果球员看到其他人可以逃避处罚，他们也会这样做。没有人愿意面对不公平的优势，比如有些球员耍赖却逍遥法外，这样下去就会升级，直到裁判们重新掌控局势。

source: I n 1977 , the physicist Freeman Dyson published the first of a series of articles about how plants affect the planet 's carbon-dioxide concentrations . Every summer , plants absorb about a tenth of the carbon dioxide in the atmosphere . In the fall , when they stop growing or shed their leaves , they release most of it back into the air . Dyson proposed creating forests of " carbon-eating trees , " engineered to suck carbon more ravenously from the air , and to keep it tied up in thick roots that would decay into topsoil , trapping the carbon . He now estimates that by annually increasing topsoil by just a tenth of an inch over land that supports vegetation , we could offset all human carbon emissions .
domestication: 一九七七年，物理学家弗里曼·戴森发表了一系列关于植物如何影响地球二氧化碳浓度的文章。在每个夏天，植物大约吸收了大气中十分之一的二氧化碳。到了秋天，它们不再生长或者落叶时，就会将大部分二氧化碳释放回空气中。戴森提出创造“ 吃碳树”的森林，这些树经过基因工程，可以更加贪婪地从空气中吸收二氧化碳，并将其储存在厚厚的根系中。当这些根系腐烂成表土时，就会将二氧化碳困住。现在他估计，只要每年增加一英寸的表土（约合2.5厘米），就足以抵消人类所有的碳排放。
foreignization: 1977年，物理学家弗里曼·戴森（Freeman Dyson）发表了一系列关于植物如何影响地球二氧化碳浓度的文章。每个夏天，植物会吸收大约十分之一的大气中的二氧化碳。在秋季，当它们停止生长或掉落叶子时，它们会将大部分二氧化碳释放回空气中。戴森提议创建“以碳为食的树”的森林，这些树经过工程改造，可以更贪婪地从空气中吸收二氧化碳，并将其束缚在厚厚的根系中，这些根系会分解成表土，从而将碳封存起来。他现在估计，如果我们每年使植被区域的表土增加一英寸的十分之一，我们就可以抵消所有人类的碳排放。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I n 1977 , the physicist Freeman Dyson published the first of a series of articles about how plants affect the planet 's carbon-dioxide concentrations . Every summer , plants absorb about a tenth of the carbon dioxide in the atmosphere . In the fall , when they stop growing or shed their leaves , they release most of it back into the air . Dyson proposed creating forests of " carbon-eating trees , " engineered to suck carbon more ravenously from the air , and to keep it tied up in thick roots that would decay into topsoil , trapping the carbon . He now estimates that by annually increasing topsoil by just a tenth of an inch over land that supports vegetation , we could offset all human carbon emissions .

一九七七年，物理学家弗里曼·戴森发表了一系列关于植物如何影响地球二氧化碳浓度的文章。在每个夏天，植物大约吸收了大气中十分之一的二氧化碳。到了秋天，它们不再生长或者落叶时，就会将大部分二氧化碳释放回空气中。戴森提出创造“ 吃碳树”的森林，这些树经过基因工程，可以更加贪婪地从空气中吸收二氧化碳，并将其储存在厚厚的根系中。当这些根系腐烂成表土时，就会将二氧化碳困住。现在他估计，只要每年增加一英寸的表土（约合2.5厘米），就足以抵消人类所有的碳排放。

He now estimates that by annually increasing topsoil by just a tenth of an inch over land that supports vegetation , we could offset all human carbon emissions .

source: The findings underscore the complicated feelings Americans have about wealth , as well as a troubling political issue for Republican presidential candidate Mitt Romney , who has an estimated wealth of as much as $250 million . More than 70 percent of Americans say Romney 's policies would help the wealthy more than anyone else .
domestication: 美国人对财富的看法很复杂，这也让共和党总统候选人米特·罗姆尼陷入了困境，他的个人财产估计高达2.5亿美元。七成以上的美国人认为，罗姆尼的政策主要是为了让富人受益，对他们来说他简直就是“为富不仁”。

source: Techniques of cruelty vary from genocide to genocide . The forms of violence directed at particular groups are different from situation to situation . Even though the Holocaust , Rwanda and Bosnia were all genocides , the particular ways in which the Jews , the Tutsis and the Bosnian Muslims were treated were different .
domestication: 各有各的残忍手法。每次暴行都有它独特的手段，针对不同团体时也会因时因地制宜。虽然犹太人大屠杀、卢旺达和波斯尼亚都是惨绝人寰的大屠杀，但纳粹德国对犹太人的迫害，胡图族对图西族的屠杀，以及塞尔维亚族对波斯尼亚穆斯林的杀戮，方式方法各不相同。

source: The hot , dry weather is also harming parts of the nation 's infrastructure . Highways in Texas , nuclear power plants in Illinois , runways and subway rails in Washington and the concrete , steel and sophisticated engineering that undergird the nation 's infrastructure are being taxed to worrisome degrees by heat , drought and vicious storms .
domestication: 这热天不仅影响了人们的日常生活，还对国家基础设施造成了损害。在德克萨斯州，高速公路都被晒得发烫；在伊利诺伊州，核电站也受到了影响；在华盛顿，跑道和地铁轨道也都受到了极端天气的影响。那些支撑国家基础设施的混凝土、钢铁和先进技术正承受着高温、干旱和猛烈风暴的考验，这些都让人感到担忧。
foreignization: 酷热干燥的天气也在损害着该国基础设施的一部分。德克萨斯州的高速公路、伊利诺伊州的核电站、华盛顿特区的跑道和地铁轨道，以及支撑该国基础设施的混凝土、钢铁和先进工程都被热浪、干旱和残酷的暴风雨压力过大。

source: I found this the perfect book for a long weekend spent at home . This is an unashamed love story without cynicism or any attempt to be too clever . Instead , Quinn ( I am assuming no relation to Zorba the Greek ) allows us to get lost in the relationship between Connie , a dedicated Suffragette and Will , the county cricketer/First World War veteran , along with a gallery of believable characters . As always , that time period in European history provides an inexhaustible backdrop for any story .
domestication: 我觉得这本书非常适合在家里度过漫长的周末时读。这是一部不加掩饰的爱情故事，没有丝毫玩世不恭或过于巧妙的痕迹。作者奎恩（我假设他与《希腊人佐尔巴》无关）让我们沉浸在康妮——一位专心致志的妇女参政论者和威尔——一位县级板球运动员兼第一次世界大战退伍军人之间的关系中，还有许多可信的配角。就像往常一样，那段欧洲历史时期为任何故事提供了无穷无尽的背景。总之，这是一本很适合在家里闲逛时读的好书。

source: My son wears an EZ-on vest . It slips over his arms and zippers up the back . You have to attach straps on your car that come with it . 2 straps come over top of seat and attach to vest , and 2 straps come between seats to attach at his waist . This has worked great for him and he likes wearing it .
domestication: 我儿子戴着一种叫EZ-on的背心，这种背心非常方便，直接从胳膊上套过去，然后在后面拉上拉链就行了。使用的时候，你需要在车上安装配套的带子，一共有四条，两条从座位上方跨过，然后和背心上的扣子连接，另外两条穿过两个座位之间，最后扣在孩子的腰上。这种背心对我们来说非常好用，孩子也喜欢戴。
foreignization: 我的儿子穿着一种叫EZ-on的马甲。它可以从他的手臂滑过去，然后在后面拉上拉链。你需要在你的车上安装附带的带子。其中两条带子绕过座位的顶部然后连接到马甲上，另外两条带子则穿过座位之间并连接到他的腰部。这对他来说效果很好，而且他喜欢穿它。

source: I n Austin , where Perry has emerged as the longest-serving -- and probably the most powerful -- governor in Texas history , everyone has a different theory about why he has fared so poorly in the early rounds of the presidential campaign . His team , most of whom have been at Perry 's side for a decade or more , is considered very tight , very skillful , and very controlling ; they do n't leak , and , in Texas elections at least , they do n't make many mistakes . Their zeal for control , however , means that Perry has given fewer press interviews over the years than many governors . He has thus never been forced to develop the conversational polish that televised debates and interviews demand .
domestication: 在奥斯汀，里克·佩里已经成为德州历史上任职时间最长、权力最大的一位州长。在他开始竞选总统的初期，大家都对他的表现感到意外，因为他的成绩非常糟糕。他的团队大部分成员跟随他十年以上，都是经验丰富的高手，很少犯错，也不会有任何信息泄露。但是，他们过度控制的性格使得佩里这些年来接受媒体采访的次数远远少于其他州长。因此，他从来没有机会在电视辩论和采访中磨练自己的口才。
foreignization: 在奥斯汀，佩里已成为德克萨斯州历史上任职时间最长且可能最有权力的州长，每个人都有自己对他在总统竞选初期表现不佳的不同看法。他的团队大多数成员陪伴佩里超过十年，团队被认为非常紧密、非常擅长也非常控制欲强，他们不会泄露消息，在德克萨斯州的选举中至少他们不会犯太多错误。然而，他们对控制的热情意味着佩里多年来接受的新闻采访比很多州长都少。因此，他从未被迫培养出电视辩论和采访所需的对话风度。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I n Austin , where Perry has emerged as the longest-serving -- and probably the most powerful -- governor in Texas history , everyone has a different theory about why he has fared so poorly in the early rounds of the presidential campaign . His team , most of whom have been at Perry 's side for a decade or more , is considered very tight , very skillful , and very controlling ; they do n't leak , and , in Texas elections at least , they do n't make many mistakes . Their zeal for control , however , means that Perry has given fewer press interviews over the years than many governors . He has thus never been forced to develop the conversational polish that televised debates and interviews demand .

source: When did Europe pull ahead of Asia in terms of living standards ? A number of well-known scholars compare economic and demographic indicators of well-being in the pre-industrial period . The emerging picture is not one of great differences , but of considerable similarities in standard of living between Europe and Asia before the Industrial Revolution .  Editorial Reviews  Review
domestication: 欧洲在生活水平方面比亚洲先进起来，是什么时候开始的呢？很多有名的学者比较过工业革命前欧洲和亚洲的经济和人口指标，结果发现两地在生活水平上差异并不大，反而有很多相似之处。在工业革命之前，欧洲和亚洲的生活水平其实差距不大，这让人颇感意外。
foreignization: 欧洲在生活水平方面什么时候超过了亚洲？ 一些著名学者比较了工业化前时期的经济和人口指标。出现的图景并非是差异很大，而是在工业革命之前，欧洲与亚洲的生活水平有着相当多的相似之处。 编辑评论 评论
